InfFlowWhileInvariantRule.InfFlowData
 
InfiniteUnionHandler
This class handles the infiniteUnion function.
InfoDialog
 
InformationFlowContract
A contract about the dependencies of an observer symbol, consisting of a precondition, a depends clause, and a measured-by clause.
InformationFlowContractImpl
Standard implementation of the DependencyContract interface.
InformationFlowContractImplSupplier
 
InformationFlowContractInfo
 
InformationFlowContractSupplier
 
InformationWindow
The information window is used to present detailed information about the execution of a solver.
InformationWindow
The information window is used to present detailed information about the execution of a solver.
InformationWindow.Information
 
InformationWindow.Information
 
InfoTree
This class is used by InfoView to display its contents.
InfoTreeModel
Extension of DefaultTreeModel used by InfoTree.
InfoTreeNode
Every node of InfoTree is an instance of this class.
InfoView
Class for info contents displayed in MainWindow.
InfoViewContentPane
This class is used to display descriptions in InfoView.
InheritanceSpecification
Inheritance specification.
InitArray
Split an array creation expression with explicit array initializer, creating a creation expression with dimension expression and a list of assignments (-> Java language specification, 15.10)
InitArrayCreation
Split an array creation expression with explicit array initializer, creating a creation expression with dimension expression and a list of assignments (-> Java language specification, 15.10) This meta construct delivers the creation expression
InitConfig
an instance of this class describes the initial configuration of the prover.
InitiallyClause
 
InitiallyClauseImpl
Standard implementation of the InitiallyClause interface.
InitialPositionTable
An InitialPositionTable is a PositionTable that describes the beginning of the element/subelement relationship.
Inject
Marker annotations for setters or constructors to inject implementations.
InjectionException
 
InjectionException
 
InjectionReflectionException
 
InnerBreakAndContinueReplacer
This replaces all breaks and continues in a loop with break l, where l is a specified label.
InnerNodeView
Sequent view for an inner node.
InnerNodeViewListener
Listener for an InnerNodeView
InnerVariableNamer
Implements "inner renaming", i.e.
InsertionTacletBrowserMenuItem
 
InspectorForDecisionPredicates
 
InspectorForFormulas
Inspects whether a given string can be translated into a formula.
InstanceAllocationMethodBuilder
creates a method declaration with no implementation.
Instanceof
Instanceof.
InstanceOfHandler
This SMT translation handler takes care of instanceof and exactinstanceof functions.
InstanceOperatorHandler
This class handles translation of the instance and exactInstance function.
InstantiateCommand
instantiate var=a occ=2 with="a_8" hide
InstantiateCommand.Parameters
 
InstantiatedSVFeature
Feature that returns zero iff a certain schema variable is instantiated.
InstantiationCost
Feature that returns the number of branches after instantiated the quantifier formula.
InstantiationCostScalerFeature
 
InstantiationEntry<E>
 
InstantiationFileHandler
 
InstantiationProposer
Provides proposals for schema variable instantiations.
InstantiationProposerCollection
Composite of instantiation proposers.
InStrictFp
This variable condition checks if a context is affected by the strictfp modifier
IntegerHandler
 
IntegerLDT
This class inherits from LDT and implements all method that are necessary to handle integers, shorts and bytes.
IntegerOpHandler
This SMT translation handler takes care of integer expressions.
IntegerOpHandler
This class handles translation of the integer operators.
IntegerSimplificationMacro
This macro performs simplification of integers and terms with integers.
IntegerStrategy
 
IntegerStrategyFactory
 
IntegerUtil
 
InteractionListener
 
InteractionListener.SettingType
 
Interactive
CIs should never execute these tests, because they require manual interaction.
InteractiveRuleApplicationCompletion
Instances of class implementing this interface are able to complete rule applications.
InterfaceDeclaration
Interface declaration.
IntermediatePresentationProofFileParser
Parses a KeY proof file into an intermediate representation.
IntermediatePresentationProofFileParser.Result
Simple structure comprising the results of the parser.
IntermediateProofReplayer
This class is responsible for generating a KeY proof from an intermediate representation generated by IntermediatePresentationProofFileParser.
IntermediateProofReplayer.BuiltInConstructionException
Signals an error during construction of a built-in rule app.
IntermediateProofReplayer.Result
Simple structure containing the results of the replay procedure.
IntermediateProofReplayer.TacletAppConstructionException
Signals an error during construction of a taclet app.
InterruptListener
Event listener for interruptions.
Intersect
 
IntIterator
 
IntLiteral
Int literal.
IntroAtPreDefsOp
Transformer that introduces concrete prestate variables
IntroducedSymbolBy
 
InvalidSettingsInputException
 
InvariantConfigurator
This class creates a dialog to input a user-defined invariant, variant and modifiable formula for a selected loop.
IObserverFunction
 
IOUtil
Provides static methods to work with java IO.
IOUtil.IFileVisitor
A visitor which does something with Files.
IOUtil.LineInformation
A line information returned from IOUtil.computeLineInformation(File) and IOUtil.computeLineInformation(InputStream).
IPersistablePO
This interface extends the standard proof obligation (ProofOblInput) with functionality to define the individual parameters which are required for loading and saving *.proof files.
IPersistablePO.LoadedPOContainer
The class stored in a Properties instance via key must provide the static method with the following signature: public static LoadedPOContainer loadFrom(InitConfig initConfig, Properties properties) throws IOException This method is called by the AbstractProblemLoader to recreate a proof obligation.
IProgramMethod
 
IProgramVariable
 
IProofFileParser
Defines the required which a KeYParser needs to parse a *.proof file and to apply the rules again.
IProofFileParser.ProofElementID
Enumeration of the different syntactic elements occurring in a saved proof tree representation.
IProofReference<T>
A proof reference which points to a source member used during proof.
IProofReferencesAnalyst
Instances of this class are used to compute IProofReference for a given Node based on the applied rule.
IrrelevantTermLabelsProperty
A property that can be used in EqualsModProperty.equalsModProperty(Object, Property, Object[]) for terms.
IRunnableWithException
A Runnable that provides access to an exception that occurred during execution IRunnableWithException.getException().
IRunnableWithResult<T>
A Runnable that has a result that is accessible via IRunnableWithResult.getResult().
IsabelleHandler
This class is a slightly adjusted version of SMTHandler.
IsabelleHandler.Capability
An enumeration of the possible answers of a handler to the IsabelleHandler.canHandle(Term) method.
IsabelleHandlerServices
Adapted version of the SMTHandlerServices for the Isabelle translation.
IsabelleLauncher
This class allows for the launch of automated proof searches in Isabelle for a list of isabelle problems.
IsabelleLauncherListener
Interface for listener classes for the IsabelleLauncher
IsabelleLauncherProgressDialogMediator
Updates the IsabelleProgressDialog for a given IsabelleLauncher.
IsabelleMasterHandler
This class is responsible for translating the sequent of a given goal.
IsabelleNotFoundException
 
IsabelleProblem
This class represents an Isabelle problem.
IsabelleProgressDialog
Dialog showing launched Isabelle processes and results.
IsabelleProgressDialog.IsabelleProgressDialogListener
Listener interface to interact with this dialog.
IsabelleProgressDialog.Modus
Current state of the dialog.
IsabelleProgressModel
Encapsulates the table of progress bars that is shown within the progress dialog: For each solver and each goal there is a cell.
IsabelleProgressModel.ProcessColumn
 
IsabelleProgressModel.TitleColumn
 
IsabelleProofApplyUserAction
 
IsabelleResource
An IsabelleResource is a bundling of an Isabelle instance and a Theory derived from that instance.
IsabelleResourceController
This class handles creation of Isabelle instances, as well as providing methods for their destruction.
IsabelleResult
This class stores the result of a IsabelleSolver.
IsabelleResult.Type
Enum containing different types of Results.
IsabelleRule
 
IsabelleRuleApp
 
IsabelleSettingsProvider
SettingsProvider for Isabelle translation extension
IsabelleSledgehammerSolver
Implementation of IsabelleSolver using Sledgehammer.
IsabelleSolver
An Isabelle solver.
IsabelleSolver.SolverState
state of the solver
IsabelleSolverListener
Listener for IsabelleSolvers.
IsabelleTranslateAllAction
Action to translate all open goals.
IsabelleTranslationAction
Action to translate the selected goal.
IsabelleTranslationExtension
Extension class for Isabelle translation
IsabelleTranslationSettings
Settings object used for Isabelle translation.
IsabelleTranslator
Translator for Isabelle.
ISideProofStoreListener
Observes changes on a SideProofStore.
IsInductionVariable
The comment below was the description used in the variable condition:
IsLabeledCondition
Checks whether the given statement is labeled, i.e., actual a LabeledStatement.
IsNonRigidTermFeature
 
IsStatic
Creates a true or false literal if the given program element is or is not a static variable reference.
IssueDialog
A dialog for showing (possibly multiple) issues with a preview window.
IsThisReference
This variable condition checks if a given type denotes an abstract class or interface type.
ISymbolicAssociation
Represents an association of an ISymbolicState or ISymbolicObject which is a reference to an ISymbolicObject.
ISymbolicAssociationValueContainer
This interface is not instantiated directly because it defines only the common behavior of ISymbolicState and ISymbolicObject which is to contain associations (references to other ISymbolicObjects) and values (local variables of simple types).
ISymbolicElement
Defines the basic methods and properties each element in an symbolic object model has to have.
ISymbolicEquivalenceClass
An equivalence class which defines which JTerms represent the same ISymbolicObject in an ISymbolicLayout.
ISymbolicLayout
This interface represents the root element of a symbolic memory layout.
ISymbolicObject
Represents a symbolic object in an ISymbolicLayout.
ISymbolicState
Represents the symbolic state of an ISymbolicLayout.
ISymbolicValue
Represents a variable of an ISymbolicState or ISymbolicObject which contains a value of a primitive type.
ITacletIndex
 
ITermTacletAppIndexCache
The general interface for caches for accelerating TermTacletAppIndex.
ITreeSettings
Provides the settings used to construct the symbolic execution tree.
JAbstractSortedOperator
Abstract sorted operator class offering some common functionality.
JavaApplicationClassLoader
An IClassLoader implementation for Java Applications.
JavaASTCollector
Walks through a java AST in depth-left-fist-order.
JavaASTVisitor
Extends the JavaASTWalker to use the visitor mechanism.
JavaASTWalker
walks through a java AST in depth-left-fist-order at default.
JavaBlock
 
JavaBuildingExceptions
 
JavaBuildingIssue
 
JavaCardDLStrategy
 
JavaCardDLStrategyFactory
 
JavacExtension
Extensions provides Javac checks for recent-loaded Java files.
JavaCompilerCheckFacade
This facade checks whether the Java program to be verified is compilable using javac via the JavaCompiler class .
JavaDeclaration
Java declaration.
JavaDLFieldNames
 
JavaDLFieldNames.ParsedFieldName
 
JavaDLMatchVMInstructionSet
Class encoding the instructions of the matching vm
JavaDLOperatorUtil
 
JavaDLSequentKit
 
JavaDLTheory
The JavaDL theory class provides access to function symvols, sorts that are part of the core logic like cast or instanceof functions.
JavaDocument
This document performs syntax highlighting when strings are inserted.
JavaInfFlowProfile
This profile sets up KeY for verification of JavaCard programs.
JavaInfo
an instance serves as representation of a Java model underlying a DL formula.
JavaJMLEditorLexer
This lexer splits a text into tokens with coloured attributes.
JavaLogger
 
JavaModel
 
JavaNonTerminalProgramElement
Top level implementation of a Java NonTerminalProgramElement.
JavaParserFactory
 
JavaProfile
This profile sets up KeY for verification of JavaCard programs.
JavaProfileDefaultProfileResolver
A DefaultProfileResolver which returns AbstractProfile.getDefaultProfile().
JavaProfileWithPermissionsDefaultProfileResolver
A DefaultProfileResolver which returns JavaProfile.defaultInstancePermissions.
JavaProgramElement
Top level implementation of a Java ProgramElement.
JavaReduxFileCollection
This is a special FileCollection which allows to retrieve the internally stored java boot sources and to iterate over them.
JavascriptCommand
 
JavascriptCommand.JavascriptInterface
 
JavascriptCommand.Parameters
 
JavaService
Facade for the JavaParser.
JavaSourceElement
Top level implementation of a Java SourceElement.
JavaStatement
Default implementation for non-terminal Java statements.
JavaTools
Miscellaneous static methods related to Java blocks or statements in KeY.
JavaTransformer
The JavaDL requires some implicit fields, that are available in each Java class.
JavaTypeToSortCondition
Variable condition that enforces a given generic sort to be instantiated with the sort of a program expression a schema variable is instantiated with
JFOLStrategy
 
JFOLStrategyFactory
 
JFunction
Objects of this class represent function and predicate symbols in JavaDL.
JmlAssert
A JML assert statement.
JmlAssertBuiltInRuleApp
The rule application for JmlAssertRule
JmlAssertRule
A rule for JML assert/assume statements.
JMLBuiltInPropertyResolver
Resolver for built-in JML operators.
JmlCheck
Interface describes a syntactical check on JML parse trees.
JmlChecks
Facade for implementing syntactical JML syntax checks.
JMLCommentTransformer
Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
JmlDocRemoval
 
JmlEnabledKeysIndicator
Provides a Label in the status line for the indication of the current enabled keys for the JML condition evaluation.
JmlFacade
This facade provides facilities for the creation of lexer and parser of JML.
JMLInfoExtractor
Helper class used by the JML translation.
JmlIO
Stateful service for translating JML into KeY entities.
JmlLexer
 
JmlMarkerDecision
Externalize algorithm to decide whether a JML comment is active given a set of enabled keys.
JMLModifier
Enum to wrap all current jml modifiers to avoid having to work with strings.

JmlParserBaseListener
This class provides an empty implementation of JmlParserListener, which can be extended to create a listener which only needs to handle a subset of the available methods.
JmlParserBaseVisitor<T>
This class provides an empty implementation of JmlParserVisitor, which can be extended to create a visitor which only needs to handle a subset of the available methods.
JmlParserListener
This interface defines a complete listener for a parse tree produced by JmlParser.
JmlParserVisitor<T>
This interface defines a complete generic visitor for a parse tree produced by JmlParser.
JMLResolverManager
Resolver manager for JML.
JMLSpecExtractor
Extracts JML class invariants and operation contracts from JML comments.
JMLSpecFactory
A factory for creating class invariants and operation contracts from textual JML specifications.
JMLSpecFactory.ContractClauses
 
JmlTermFactory
Old legacy factory methods for constructing KeY terms for JML constructs.
JMLTransformer
 
JModality
This class is used to represent a dynamic logic modality like diamond and box (but also extensions of DL like preserves and throughout are possible in the future).
JModality.JavaModalityKind
 
JoinDialog
 
JoinIsApplicable
Methods for checking the applicability of a join for a given selection and thereby computing the prospective join partners.
JoinMenuItem
The menu item for the "delayed-cut" join rule.
JoinProcessor
The JoinProcessor is responsible for executing the joining.
JoinProcessor.Listener
 
JOperatorSV
Abstract base class for schema variables.
JP2KeYConverter
 
JP2KeYTypeConverter
provide means to convert recoder types to the corresponding KeY type structures.
JPContext
 
JTerm
In contrast to the distinction of formulas and terms as made by most of the inductive definitions of the syntax of a logic, an instance of this class can stand for a term or a formula.
JumpStatement
Jump statement.
Junctor
Class of junctor operators, i.e., operators connecting a given number of formula to create another formula.
KeyAction
Common class for all "actions" (menu entries / toolbar buttons) the user can trigger.
KeyAst<T>
This is a monad around the parse tree.
KeyAst.ConfigurationFile
 
KeyAst.Expression
 
KeyAst.File
 
KeyAst.ProofScript
This struct encapsulate the information of a proof script found in key files.
KeyAst.Seq
 
KeyAst.SetStatementContext
 
KeyAst.Taclet
 
KeyAst.Term
 
KeyboardShortcutAdapter
Adapter for KeYGuiExtension.KeyboardShortcuts interface.
KeyboardTacletExtension
TODO Add documentation!
KeYCollections
Utilities for Collections.
KeYConstants
 
KeYEditorLexer
This is a lexer class used by a SourceHighlightDocument to highlight KeY code.
KeYEnvironment<U>
Instances of this class are used to collect and access all relevant information for verification with KeY.
KeYFacade
This class provides static methods to access the prover (KeY).
KeYFile
Represents an input from a .key file producing an environment.
KeYFileChooser
Extends the usual Swing file chooser by a bookmark panel and predefined filters.
KeYFileChooserBookmarkPanel
This is a Panel used as accessory for the JFileChooser.
KeYFileChooserLoadingOptions
 
KeYGuiExtension
A marker interface for extension of the KeY GUI.
KeYGuiExtension.ContextMenu
This interface describes the UI extension for adding various context menus.
KeYGuiExtension.Info
 
KeYGuiExtension.KeyboardShortcuts
Extension Point for defining keyboard shortcuts for various components.
KeYGuiExtension.LeftPanel
This interface describes the UI extension point on the left bottom corner (JTabbedPane).
KeYGuiExtension.MainMenu
Main Menu extension provides entry to the extension JMenu in the main frame.
KeYGuiExtension.Settings
This interface describes the UI extension to add a SettingsProvider into the default settings dialog.
KeYGuiExtension.Startup
Simplest extension point.
KeYGuiExtension.StatusLine
This interface describes the UI extension to add a components into the status line (right side) of the main window.
KeYGuiExtension.TermInfo
Extension interface for the term info string in the status line.
KeYGuiExtension.Toolbar
This interface describes the UI extension to add a KeYGuiExtension.Toolbar into the main window.
KeYGuiExtension.Tooltip
Extension interface for the tooltips in the sequent view.
KeYGuiExtensionFacade
Facade for retrieving the GUI extensions.
KeyIO
This facade provides high level access to parse and interpret key files or input strings into declarations, proof, problem, terms.
KeYJavaASTFactory
The KeYASTFactory helps building KeY Java AST structures.
KeYJavaPipeline
 
KeYJavaType
The KeY java type realises a tuple (sort, type) of a logic sort and the java type (for example a class declaration).
KeYJavaType.LexicographicalKeYJavaTypeOrder<T>
 
KeYJPMapping
 
KeYLexer
 
KeYMediator
The KeYMediator provides control logic for the user interface implemented in Swing.
KeYMenuCheckBox
This class can be used for adding Checkboxes to the menu.
KeYParser

KeYParserBaseListener
This class provides an empty implementation of KeYParserListener, which can be extended to create a listener which only needs to handle a subset of the available methods.
KeYParserBaseVisitor<T>
This class provides an empty implementation of KeYParserVisitor, which can be extended to create a visitor which only needs to handle a subset of the available methods.
KeYParserListener
This interface defines a complete listener for a parse tree produced by KeYParser.
KeYParserVisitor<T>
This interface defines a complete generic visitor for a parse tree produced by KeYParser.
KeYProgModelInfo
 
KeYProjectHomepageAction
Open the KeY project homepage in the system default browser.
KeYResourceManager
KeYResourceManager controls the access to the properties and resources used in the KeY system.
KeYSelectionEvent<Sel>
An event that indicates that the users focused node or proof has changed
KeYSelectionListener
The KeYSelectionListener is notified if the proof or the node the user works with has changed.
KeYSelectionModel
 
KeyStrokeManager
Manager of the configurable KeyStrokes for proof macros and GUI actions.
KeyStrokeSettings
Class for storing and retrieving KeyStrokes.
KeYToolbarExtensionAdapter
 
KeYTypeUtil
Provides utility methods which makes it easier to analyze the type hierarchy of KeYJavaType instances with help of given Services.
KeYUserProblemFile
Represents an input from a .key user problem file producing an environment as well as a proof obligation.
KeYWatchpoint
ThisKeYWatchpoint represents a KeY watchpoint and is responsible to tell the debugger to stop execution when the respective watchpoint evaluates its condition to true.
Label
 
LabelCollection
Realises a collection for term labels keeping track whether its content has been modified since its initialization.
LabelCollector
Collects all labels found in a given program.
LabeledParserRuleContext
This class maps a ParserRuleContext to a TermLabel.
LabeledStatement
Labeled statement.
LabeledTermImpl
The labeled term class is used for terms that have a label attached.
LabelJumpStatement
Label jump statement.
LanguageElement
 
LateApplicationCheck
Methods for computing conflicts affecting a delayed cut application.
Layouter<M>
This class pretty-prints information using line breaks and indentation.
LDT
An "LDT" or "language data type" class corresponds to a standard rule file shipped with KeY.
LDTHandler
 
LDTHandler.TypedOperator
Pair (KJT, Operator)
LDTInput
Represents the LDT .key files as a whole.
LDTInput.LDTInputListener
 
LeaveCommand
 
LeftmostNegAtomFeature
Feature that returns zero if there is no atom with negative polarity on a common d-path and on the left of the find-position within the find-formula as a formula of the antecedent.
LemmaGenerationAction
 
LemmaGenerationAction.Mode
 
LemmaGenerationAction.ProveAndAddTaclets
 
LemmaGenerationAction.ProveKeYTaclets
 
LemmaGenerationAction.ProveUserDefinedTaclets
 
LemmaGenerationBatchModeAction
 
LemmaGenerator
A Lemma Generator translates a taclet to its corresponding first order logic formula thats validity implies the validity of the taclet.
LemmaGeneratorSettings
 
LemmaJustification
RuleJustification for taclets, that can be proven from other taclets.
LemmaSelectionDialog
The core of the Selection-Dialog is the class SelectionPanel which extends JPanel.
LemmataAutoModeOptions
 
LemmataHandler
 
Leq
The Leq element of the sign lattice, representing all negative numbers and zero.
LessOrEquals
Less or equals.
LessThan
Less than.
LetCommand
 
LetFeature<Goal>
 
LexicographicComparator<U>
Compares arrays of comparable objects (e.g., Integer).
LexPathOrdering
 
LicenseAction
Shows the license dialog.
LightweightSyntacticalReplaceVisitor
A lightweight version of SyntacticalReplaceVisitor which does not replace labels.
LineBreakpoint
 
LinkedHashMap<K,V>
 
LinkedHashMapWrapper<K,V>
This class is a wrapper for LinkedHashMap where the keys are elements that implement EqualsModProperty.
ListInstantiation<T>
 
Literal
Literal.
LiteralsSmallerThanFeature
 
LoadUserTacletsDialog
 
LoadUserTacletsDialog.Mode
this dialog can be in one of two modes (started from different actions)
LocalClassTransformation
Local and anonymous classes may access variables from the creating context if they are declared final and initialised.
LocalVariableCondition
Ensures the given ProgramElement denotes a local variable
LocalVariableDeclaration
Local variable declaration.
LocatableException
A simple checked exception which holds an location.
Location
This class represents a location in a file.
Location
A Location is a pair (objectID, fieldID)
Location
Represents a location like a local variable, method parameter, static field or an instance field on a specified object.
LocationSet
A LocationSet represents a location set in an SMT model.
LocationVariable
This class represents proper program variables, which are not program constants.
LocationVariableTracker
Tracks which rule application introduced each LocationVariable in a proof.
LocSetLDT
 
Log
 
Logger
A logger for printing messages of given severity levels.
LogicalAnd
Logical and.
LogicalNot
Logical not.
LogicalOr
Logical or.
LogicalVariableHandler
This simple SMT translation handler takes care of logical variables.
LogicalVariableHandler
Handles the translation of LogicVariables.
LogicElement
 
LogicPrinter
The front end for the Sequent pretty-printer.
LogicServices
 
LogicVariable
The objects of this class represent logical variables, used e.g.
LogLevel
Denotes the severity level of a message (usually generated by a checker) to print by a Logger.
LogView
 
LogView.FileWatcherService
 
LongLiteral
 
Lookup
This class handles the management of services and implementations.
LookupListener
 
LoopApplyHeadBuiltInRuleApp
Rule application for LoopApplyHeadRule.
LoopApplyHeadCompletion
Interactive completion for LoopApplyHeadBuiltInRuleApp.
LoopApplyHeadRule
This rule transforms a block that starts with a for loop into one that starts with a while loop.
LoopBodyTermLabelUpdate
Makes sure that SymbolicExecutionUtil.LOOP_BODY_LABEL is introduced when a WhileInvariantRule is applied.
LoopCallPredicateSnippet
 
LoopCallWithInvariantPredicateSnippet
 
LoopContract
A contract for a block that begins with a loop.
LoopContractExternalBuiltInRuleApp<T>
Application of LoopContractExternalRule.
LoopContractExternalCompletion
Interactive completion for LoopContractExternalBuiltInRuleApp.
LoopContractExternalRule
Rule for the application of LoopContracts.
LoopContractImpl
Default implementation for LoopContract.
LoopContractImpl.Combinator
This class is used to combine multiple contracts for the same block and apply them simultaneously.
LoopContractImpl.Creator
This class is used to build LoopContractImpls.
LoopContractInternalBuiltInRuleApp<T>
Application of LoopContractInternalRule.
LoopContractInternalCompletion
Interactive completion for LoopContractInternalBuiltInRuleApp.
LoopContractInternalRule
Rule for the application of LoopContracts.
LoopContractSelectionPanel
This panel used to select which LoopContracts to use for an AbstractLoopContractBuiltInRuleApp.
LoopFreeInvariantCondition
Extracts the free loop invariants for the given loop term.
LoopInfFlowUnfoldTacletBuilder
 
LoopInit
 
LoopInitializer
Loop initializer.
LoopInvariantBuiltInRuleApp<T>
The built in rule app for the loop invariant rule.
LoopInvariantCondition
Extracts the loop invariants for a loop term (for all applicable heap contexts).
LoopInvariantNormalBehaviorTermLabelUpdate
Makes sure that SymbolicExecutionUtil.LOOP_INVARIANT_NORMAL_BEHAVIOR_LABEL is introduced when a WhileInvariantRule is applied.
LoopInvariantRuleCompletion
This class completes the instantiations of the loop invariant rule applications.
LoopInvExecutionPO
 
LoopScopeBlock
Loop scope block.
LoopScopeInvariantRule
Implementation of the "loop scope invariant" rule as proposed in the PhD thesis by Nathan Wasser.
LoopSpecification
A loop invariant, consisting of an invariant formula, a set of loop predicates, a modifiable clause, and a variant term.
LoopSpecImpl
Standard implementation of the LoopInvariant interface.
LoopStatement
Loop statement.
LoopVariantCondition
Extracts the variant for a loop term.
LoopWellDefinedness
A contract for checking the well-definedness of a jml loop invariant.
LRUCache<K,V>
Simple realisation of an LRU cache.
LruCached<A,T>
Caches a computation using a lru cache
MacroCommand
 
MacroCommand.Parameters
 
MacroKeyBinding
This class provides means to run macros with key bindings such that these can be bound to the main window making them independent of any menu.
Main
The main entry point for KeY
Main
Example application which symbolically executes example/Number#equals(Number)
Main
Example application which proves all proof obligations of the source folder 'example' using KeY.
Main
This is the starting class for ProofManagement.
Main
Simple command-line interface to the proof slicer.
Main.CheckCommand
The check subcommand applies the selected checks to the proof bundle and generates an HTML report if desired.
Main.MergeCommand
 
MainFrame
Central part of MainWindow.
MainWindow
 
MainWindowAction
KeyAction extended to automatically override the accelerator key after the default is set using MainWindowAction.setAcceleratorKey(KeyStroke) / MainWindowAction.setAcceleratorLetter(int) using the KeyStrokeManager.
MainWindowTabbedPane
Deprecated.
MapLDT
LDT for maps.
MapProperties
 
MapUtil
Utility methods for maps.
MarkerStatementHelper
 
MasterHandler
Instances of this class are the controlling units of the translation.
MasterHandler.SymbolIntroducer
This interface is used for routines that can be used to flexibly introduce function symbols.
MatchConditions
Simple container class containing the information resulting from a Taclet.match-call
MatchedAssumesFeature
Binary features that returns zero iff the if-formulas of a Taclet are instantiated or the Taclet does not have any if-formulas.
MatchGenericSortInstruction
 
MatchIdentityInstruction
A MatchInstruction that checks for syntactic identity between the current SyntaxElement and a predefined reference element.
MatchInstruction
A specialized VMInstruction for match operations that do not navigate or modify the PoolSyntaxElementCursor, but operate directly on the current SyntaxElement to which the cursor points.
MatchModalOperatorSVInstruction
 
MatchNonVariableSVInstruction
Matching VM instruction that matches all operator schema variables that are not a VariableSV or a ProgramSV.
MatchProgramInstruction
 
MatchProgramSVInstruction
 
MatchResultInfo
Container class used to track the current rule matching status
MatchSchemaVariableInstruction
 
MatchTermLabelInstruction
This match instruction implements the matching logic for term labels.
MatchVariableSVInstruction
 
MaterialDesignRegular
 
MaxRuleAppSlider
 
MayExpandMethodCondition
ensures that the given instantiation for the schemavariable denotes a method whose body may be expanded.
MediatorProofControl
A ProofControl which performs the automode in a SwingWorker.
Member
A program model element representing members.
MemberDeclaration
Member declaration.
MemberPVToField
 
MemberReference
Member reference.
MemoryFileRepo
This class uses the memory as a store for the proof-relevant files.
MemoryTestGenerationLifecycleListener
Implementation of TestGenerationLifecycleListener which stores the log in memory.
MenuSendFeedackAction
 
MergeAppIntermediate
Encapsulates intermediate information for constructing a MergeRule application.
MergeByIfThenElse
Rule that merges two sequents based on the if-then-else construction: If two locations are assigned different values in the states, the value in the merged state is chosen based on the path condition.
MergeByIfThenElse.DistanceFormRightSide
Represents the distance between formulas for an if-then-else update.
MergeContract
Specification of a MergePointStatement.
MergeIfThenElseAntecedent
Rule that merges two sequents based on the if-then-else construction: If two locations are assigned different values in the states, the value in the merged state is chosen based on the path condition.
MergeParamsSpec
Specification of merge parameters for the creation of MergeContracts;
MergePartner
A MergePartner consists of a Goal and a PosInOccurrence; the PosInOccurrence part indicates the portion of the sequent in the Goal which represents the symbolic state-program counter part.
MergePartnerAppIntermediate
Encapsulates intermediate information for constructing a close-join-partner rule application.
MergePartnerSelectionDialog
JDialog for selecting a subset of candidate goals as partners for a MergeRule application.
MergePointStatement
A statement indicating a merge point.
MergeProcedure
Defines a concrete merge procedure, in particular the result of merging two terms for a given location variable in two Symbolic Execution states.
MergeProcedure.ValuesMergeResult
Encapsulates the result of a merge of values.
MergeProcedureCompletion<C>
A completion class for merge procedures.
MergeRule
Base for implementing merge rules.
MergeRule.MergeRuleProgressListener
 
MergeRule.MergeStateEntry
Represents the result for merging to states.
MergeRuleBuiltInRuleApp
Rule application class for merge rule applications.
MergeRuleCompletion
This class completes the instantiation for a merge rule application.
MergeRuleFeature
Costs for the MergeRule; cheap if the first statement in the chosen top-level formula is a MergePointStatement, otherwise, infinitely expensive.
MergeRuleMenuItem
The menu item for the state merging rule.
MergeRuleUtils
This class encapsulates static methods used in the MergeRule implementation.
MergeTotalWeakening
Rule that merges two sequents based on "total" weakening: Replacement of symbolic state by an update setting every program variable to a fresh Skolem constant, if the respective program variable does not evaluate to the same value in both states - in this case, the original value is preserved (-> idempotency).
MergeWithLatticeAbstraction
Rule that merges two sequents based on a specified set of abstract domain lattices.
MergeWithPredicateAbstraction
Rule that merges two sequents based on a lattice of user-defined predicates.
MergeWithPredicateAbstractionFactory
A factory class for MergeWithPredicateAbstraction which is itself a MergeProcedure.
MetaAdd
 
MetaArithBitMaskOp
 
MetaBinaryAnd
 
MetaBinaryOr
 
MetaBinaryXOr
 
MetaClassReference
Meta class reference.
MetaDisjointCondition
 
MetaDiv
 
MetaEqual
 
MetaGeq
 
MetaGreater
 
MetaLeq
 
MetaLess
 
MetaMul
 
MetaPow
Computes the pow function for literals.
MetaShift
 
MetaShiftLeft
 
MetaShiftRight
 
MetaSub
 
Metavariable
Deprecated.
Method
A program model element representing methods.
MethodBodyExpandProofReferencesAnalyst
Extracts inlined methods.
MethodBodyStatement
A shortcut-statement for a method body, i.e.
MethodBreakpoint
 
MethodCall
Symbolically executes a method invocation
MethodCallProofReferencesAnalyst
Extracts called methods.
MethodDeclaration
Method declaration.
MethodDeclaration.JMLModifiers
JML modifiers of a method
MethodFrame
The statement inserted by KeY if a method call is executed.
MethodInfFlowUnfoldTacletBuilder
 
MethodName
Method name.
MethodOrConstructorReference
 
MethodReference
Method reference.
MethodStackInfo
 
MethodWellDefinedness
A contract for checking the well-definedness of a specification for a method or model field.
MinimizeInteraction
Option to specify all instantiations manually (does not apply to the automatic solver).
Minus
Minus.
MinusAssignment
Minus assignment.
MiscTools
Collection of some common, stateless functionality.
MissingInstantiationException
 
MissingProofsChecker
Checks that there exists a proof for every contract.
MissingSortException
 
Modality
 
Modality.Kind
 
ModalityCache
Caches whether a Term contains a modality operation.
ModalityPositionTable
This is a position table for program modality formulae.
ModalitySideProofRule
A BuiltInRule which evaluates a modality in a side proof.
ModalOperatorSV
Schema variable matching modal operators.
Model
The JML modifier "model".
Model
Represents an SMT model.
ModelChangeListener
this interface is implemented by listener of change events of a model
ModelElement
A semantical part of the software model.
ModelEvent
this class represents a Model event
ModelExtractor
Class for sending queries to the solver and extracting the relevant information regarding the model.
ModelFieldCondition
This variable condition checks if the instantiation of a schemavariable (of type Field) refers to a Java field declared as "model".
ModelMethodExecution
 
ModelSettings
Default implementation of IModelSettings.
Modifier
Modifier.
Modifier

Modifiers.JML_NULLABLE_BY_DEFAULT

Modifiers.JML_OT_READ_ONLY
 
Modifiers.JML_OT_REP

ModifiesSetTranslator
 
ModularJavaDLStrategy
 
ModularJavaDLStrategyFactory
 
ModularSMTLib2Translator
This class provides a translation from a KeY sequent to the SMT-LIB 2 language, a common input language for modern SMT solvers.
Modulo
Modulo.
ModuloAssignment
Modulo assignment.
Monomial
Class for analysing and modifying monomial expressions over the integers
MonomialColumnOp
 
MonomialsSmallerThanFeature
Feature that returns zero iff each monomial of one polynomial is smaller than all monomials of a second polynomial
MultiplesModEquationsGenerator
Try to rewrite a monomial (term) source so that it becomes a multiple of another monomial target, using the integer equations of the antecedent.
MultipleVarDecl
Replaces a declaration of multiple variables by two variable declarations where the first one declares a single variable and the second one the remaining variables.
MultiRenamingTable
 
MutableState
 
Name
 
NameAbstractionTable
This class is used for the equals modulo renaming method in SourceElement.
NameCreationInfo
 
Named
 
NamedModelElement
A model element that carries a name.
NamedProgramElement
Named program element.
NameRecorder
 
NameReference
A NameReference references an entity by its explicite name.
Namespace<E>
 
NamespaceSet
 
Native
Native.
Neg
The Neg element of the sign lattice, representing all strictly negative integers.
Negative
Negative.
New
The object allocation operator.
NewArray
The array allocation operator.
NewDependingOn
 
NewJumpLabelCondition
This variable condition ensures that no other label of the same name exists in the context program or one of the schemavariable instantiations.
NewLocalVarsCondition
For the loop scope rule, if a local program variable that may be altered by the loop body appears in the frame condition, it is necessary to use the value before the loop first executes in the frame condition.
NewRuleListener
 
NewSMTTranslationSettings
A collection of settings for the new (= 2021) SMT translation.
NewVarcond
variable condition used if a new variable is introduced
NewVarcond
 
NoArgumentCommand
 
Node
 
Node<T>
Represents a vertex/node of a tree.
NodeChange
Information about one modification of one node
NodeChangeAddFormula
Information about a formula that has been added to a node (the position given is the position of the formula within the new sequent)
NodeChangeARFormula
Information about a formula that has been added or removed from a node
NodeChangeJournal
Collect changes applied to a node during a given period of time
NodeChangeRemoveFormula
Information about a formula that has been removed from a node (the position given is the position of the formula within the new sequent)
NodeChangesHolder
 
NodeGoalPair
Simple immutable structure encapsulating a Node-Goal pair.
NodeInfo
The node info object contains additional information about a node used to give user feedback.
NodeInfoVisualizer
A UI component showing additional information about a Node in the current Proof.
NodeInfoVisualizerListener
A listener to the NodeInfoVisualizer class.
NodeIntermediate
Node in an intermediate proof representation.
NodeIntermediateWalker
Walks an intermediate proof representation tree as created when loading a *.proof file.
NodePreorderIterator
Iterates preorder over the whole sub tree of a given Node.
NodeRedundantAddChange
An instance of this class informs the listerns if a formula has been tried to add to the sequent
NodeReplacement
Information about a node replacing its parent after a rule application, currently giving information about added and removed formulas
NoFindTaclet
Used to implement a Taclet that has no find part.
NoFindTacletAppContainer
Instances of this class are immutable
NoFindTacletBuilder
Due to the immutability of Taclets, they are created in the parsers using TacletBuilders.
NoFindTacletExecutor
 
NonDuplicateAppFeature
Binary feature that returns zero iff a certain Taclet app has not already been performed
NonDuplicateAppModPositionFeature
Binary feature that returns zero iff a certain Taclet app has not already been performed
NonTerminalProgramElement
Non terminal program element.
NoPosTacletApp
A no position taclet application has no position information yet.
NoSelfApplicationFeature
This feature checks that the position of application is not contained in the if-formulas.
NoSpecifiedConverterException
Indicates a missing converter.
NoState
The JML modifier "no_state".
Notation
Encapsulate the concrete syntax used to print a term.
Notation.CastFunction
The standard concrete syntax for casts.
Notation.Constant
The standard concrete syntax for constants like true and false.
Notation.ElementaryUpdateNotation
The standard concrete syntax for elementary updates.
Notation.ElementOfNotation
The standard concrete syntax for the element of operator.
Notation.FinalNotation
The standard concrete syntax for select.
Notation.FunctionNotation
The standard concrete syntax for function and predicate terms.
Notation.HeapConstructorNotation
The standard concrete syntax for heap constructors.
Notation.IfThenElse
The standard concrete syntax for conditional terms if (phi) (t1) (t2).
Notation.Infix
The standard concrete syntax for infix operators.
Notation.LabelNotation
 
Notation.ModalityNotation
The standard concrete syntax for DL modalities box and diamond.
Notation.ModalSVNotation
The concrete syntax for DL modalities represented with a SchemaVariable.
Notation.ParallelUpdateNotation
The standard concrete syntax for parallel updates
Notation.Postfix
The standard concrete syntax for length.
Notation.Prefix
The standard concrete syntax for prefix operators.
Notation.Quantifier
The standard concrete syntax for quantifiers.
Notation.SchemaVariableNotation
 
Notation.SelectNotation
The standard concrete syntax for select.
Notation.SeqConcatNotation
 
Notation.SeqGetNotation
 
Notation.SeqSingletonNotation
The standard concrete syntax for sequence singletons.
Notation.SingletonNotation
The standard concrete syntax for singleton sets.
Notation.StoreNotation
The standard concrete syntax for store.
Notation.Subst
The standard concrete syntax for substitution terms.
Notation.UpdateApplicationNotation
The standard concrete syntax for update application.
Notation.VariableNotation
The standard concrete syntax for all kinds of variables.
NotationInfo
Stores the mapping from operators to Notations.
NotDeclException
 
NotEquals
Not equals.
NotFreeIn
 
NotificationAction
this interface is implemented by notification actions
NotificationEvent
A NotificationEvent is triggered if the system wants to notify the user about a certain situation.
NotificationEventID
This interface constants used to uniquely identify KeY system events Refactored this type into an enum.
NotificationManager
The notificatin manager controls the list of active notification tasks.
NotificationTask
A notification task maps a NotificationEvent to a list of actions to be performed when the event is encountered.
NotInScopeOfModalityFeature
Returns zero iff the position of a rule application is not in the scope of a modal operator (a program block or an update).
NotRuleFilter
 
NotUniqueException
thrown if a duplicate is being added via addUnique()
NullLiteral
Null literal.
NullNewRuleListener
Implementation of the NewRuleListener interface that does nothing
NullSort
There is one instance of this class per proof, representing the sort "Null".
NullType
A program model element representing the null type.
NumberConstantsHandler
This handler is responsible to render number constants Z(3(2(1(#)))) as "123".
NumberConstantsHandler
This handler is responsible to render number constants Z(3(2(1(#)))) as "123".
NumberRuleAppCost
 
NumberTranslation
Translates a number into a string representation.
NumberUtil
Provides utility methods to work with numbers.
ObjectVal
Represents an object inside a heap.
ObservableArrayList<E>
An observable ArrayList; poor reimplementation of the JavaFX class.
ObserverCondition
 
ObserverEqualityMetaConstruct
This meta contruct allows one to prove equality (equivalence) of two observer terms if they belong to the same observer function symbol.
ObserverFunction
Objects of this class represent "observer" function or predicate symbols.
ObserverFunctionHandler
Handles translation of Observer functions.
ObserverToUpdateRule
Implements the rule which translates the toplevel formula {U}[x = rec.query(params);]post to {U}{ x := query(heap, rec, params) }post for model methods.
OneOfCP
 
OneOfStrategyPropertyDefinition
Defines that a user interface control which edits a single key-value-pair of the StrategyProperties allows the user to select predefined values.
OneStepProofMacro
Apply a single proof step.
OneStepSimplifier
 
OneStepSimplifier.Protocol
Represents a list of rule applications performed in one OSS step.
OneStepSimplifierRuleApp
 
OpCollector
Collects all operators occurring in the traversed term.
OpCollectorJavaBlock
Extended OpCollector that also descends into Java blocks and collects all LocationVariable there.
OpenExampleAction
Opens a file dialog allowing to select the example to be loaded
OpenFileAction
 
OpenMostRecentFileAction
Loads the last opened file
OpenSingleJavaFileAction
Offers a loading of a single Java file, without considering the folder as part of a classpath.
OperationContract
 
Operator
Operator base class.
Operator
 
OperatorClassTF
 
OperatorSV
 
OperatorTF
 
OpReplacer
Replaces operators in a term by other operators with the same signature, or subterms of the term by other terms with the same sort.
Option
This annotation marks key-value arguments in proof scripts parameter classes.
OptionalVarargs
 
OptionContentNode
 
OracleBinTerm
 
OracleConstant
 
OracleGenerator
 
OracleInvariantTranslator

OracleLocationSet
 
OracleLocationSets
 
OracleMethod

OracleTerm
 
OracleType
 
OracleUnaryTerm
 
OracleUnaryTerm.Op
 
OracleVariable
 
OriginTermLabel
An OriginTermLabel saves a term's origin in the JML specification (OriginTermLabel.getOrigin()) as well as the origins of all of its subterms and former subterms (OriginTermLabel.getSubtermOrigins()).
OriginTermLabel.FileOrigin
Origin for terms that originate from a file.
OriginTermLabel.NodeOrigin
Origin for terms that originate from a proof node.
OriginTermLabel.Origin
An origin encapsulates some information about where a term originates from.
OriginTermLabel.SpecType
A SpecType is any type of JML specification which gets translated into JavaDL.
OriginTermLabelFactory
Factory for OriginTermLabels.
OriginTermLabelPolicy
Policy for OriginTermLabels.
OriginTermLabelRefactoring
Refactoring for OriginTermLabels.
OriginTermLabelsExt
Extension adapter for OriginTermLabels and OriginTermLabelVisualizers.
OriginTermLabelVisualizer
This UI component visualizes the OriginTermLabels of a term and its sub-terms.
OuterBreakContinueAndReturnCollector
 
OuterBreakContinueAndReturnReplacer
 
OutputEnvironment
This class manages the different paths in the output folder.
OutputStreamProofSaver
Saves a proof to a given OutputStream.
OverflowChecker
 
OverloadedOperatorHandler
This class is used to resolve arithmetic operations to SLExpressions.
OverloadedOperatorHandler.JMLOperator
Enumeration of all arithmetic operators which can be overloaded.
OverloadedOperatorHandler.JMLOperatorHandler
Functional interface that defines how JML arithmetic operators are overloaded for particular arguments.
OverloadedOperatorHandler.LocSetHandler
 
OverloadedOperatorHandler.SequenceHandler
 
Package
A program model element representing packages.
PackageReference
Package reference.
PackageReferenceContainer
Element that contains a PackageReference.
PackageSpecification
Package specification.
Pair<T1,T2>
Simple value object to hold two values.
PanZoomImageView
A simple image view that may be panned and zoomed by the user.
ParameterContainer
Describes program elements that contain ParameterDeclarations.
ParameterDeclaration
Formal parameters require a VariableSpecificationList of size() <= 1 (size() == 0 for abstract methods) without initializer (for Java).
ParameterlessTermLabel
The Class ParameterlessTermLabel can be used to define labels without parameters.
ParametricFunctionDecl
 
ParametricFunctionInstance
 
ParametricMergeProcedure
A MergeProcedure like MergeWithPredicateAbstraction which cannot be applied without parameters being set beforehand.
ParametricSortDecl
 
ParametricSortInstance
 
ParenthesizedExpression
Redundant Parentheses.
ParentIsInterfaceDeclaration
 
ParsableVariable
 
ParserConfig
 
ParserException
This class represents an error of a parser.
ParsingFacade
This facade provides low-level access to the ANTLR4 Parser and Lexer.
PartialComparator<T>
A comparison function, which imposes a partial ordering on some collection of objects.
PartialComparator.PartialComparisonResult
Possible results of the comparison.
PartialInvAxiom
A class axiom which is essentially of the form "o. -> phi": it demands that the invariants of the objects of a particular class imply a particular formula.
PassiveExpression
Marks an active statement as inactive.
PathConfig
Keeps some central paths to files and directories.
PathNode
Represents a node in a file tree where nodes contain Path objects.
Performance
Tests for performance regression measuring.
PerfScope
 
PermissionLDT
 
PerpetualTermLabelPolicy
This policy always maintains a label.
PIOPathIterator
 
Pipe
This interface describes a pipe for sending messages to or receiving them from an external SMT solver process.
PipelineConstants
 
Plus
Addition or string concatenation operator "+".
PlusAssignment
Addition or string concatenation assignment "+=".
POExtension
Instances of this interface are used to customize and extend the behavior of a ProofOblInput.
PolymorphicHandler
This handler treats polymorphic symbols, in particular if-then-else and equals.
PolymorphicHandler
This handles translation of equals and if-then-else
Polynomial
Class for analysing and modifying polynomial expressions over the integers
PolynomialValuesCmpFeature
Return zero only if the value of one (left) polynomial always will be (less or equal) or (less) than the value of a second (right) polynomial.
PoolSyntaxElementCursor
An iterator that walks in first-depth order through the syntax element.
Pos
The Pos element of the sign lattice, representing all strictly positive numbers.
PosInOccurrence
 
PosInProgram
this class describes the position of a statement in a program.
PosInSequent
describes a position in a sequent including the bounds within a string representation of the sequent.
PosInSequentTransferable
This class in an implementation of the Transferable interface and allows to transfer a PosInSequent object.
PosInTerm
 
PosInTerm.PiTIterator
 
Position
The position of a source element, given by its line and column number.
Position
 
PositionalVarargs
 
PositionedIssueString
Small data class that in addition to the information already contained by PositionedString (text, filename, position) contains a String for additional information which can be used to store a stacktrace if present.
PositionedIssueString.Kind
 
PositionedLabeledString
A positionedString with labels, which can then be passed over to the translated term.
PositionedString
A string with associated position information (file and line number).
PositionInfo
represents a group of three Positions: relativePosition, startPosition, endPosition 2019-09-10 Wolfram Pfeifer: work with URIs instead of Strings -> more robust, more general
PositionTable
A PositionTable describes the start and end positions of substrings of a String in order to get a PosInSequent from an int describing a position in a string representing a Term or a Sequent, etc.
Positive
Positive.
POSnippetFactory
 
PosTableLayouter
 
PosTableLayouter.Mark
 
PosTableLayouter.MarkType
 
PosTacletApp
A position taclet application object, contains already the information to which term/formula of the sequent the taclet is attached.
PostDecrement
Post decrement.
PostIncrement
Post increment.
PostWork
creates an assignment instantiationOf(#newObjectsV).$initialized = true
PreDecrement
Pre decrement.
PredicateAbstractionCompletion
Completion class for MergeWithPredicateAbstraction.
PredicateAbstractionMergeContract
A MergeContract for the MergeWithPredicateAbstraction MergeProcedure.
PredicateEstimator
Responsible for estimating decision predicates for a join.
PredicateEstimator.Result
Encapsulates a decision predicate for the delayed cut mechanism and the common parent node at which to prune, i.e.
PredictCostProver
TODO: rewrite, this seems pretty inefficient ...
PreferenceSaver
A simple utility which stores and loads user manipulatable properties of swing components in the system's preferences.
PrefixTermTacletAppIndexCacheImpl
The abstract superclass of caches for taclet app indexes that are implemented using a common backend LRUCache (the backend is stored in TermTacletAppIndexCacheSet).
PrefixTermTacletAppIndexCacheImpl.CacheKey
 
PreIncrement
Pre increment.
PrepareInfFlowContractPreBranchesMacro
The macro UseInformationFlowContractMacro applies all applicable information flow contracts.
PrepareInfFlowContractPreBranchesMacro.RemovePostStrategy
This strategy accepts all rule apps for which the rule name starts with a string in the admitted set and rejects everything else.
PrepareObjectBuilder
Creates the preparation method for pre-initilizing the object fields with their default settings.
PreParser
Transforms pure text comments into TextualJMLConstructs.
PrettyPrinter
A configurable pretty printer for Java source elements originally from COMPOST.
PrettyPrintToggleAction
 
PreviewDialog
Dialog that displays a rendering of the dependency graph.
PrimitiveHeapTermFeature
 
PrimitiveType
A program model element representing primitive types.
PrintFeature
For debugging purposes.
PrintTermFeature
 
Private
Private.
ProblemFinder
This visitor finds the problem information (problemTerm, choosedContract, and proofObligation) of a KeyAst.File.
ProblemInformation
This POJO represents the static information of a KeY problem.
ProblemInitializer
 
ProblemInitializer.ProblemInitializerListener
 
ProblemLoader
This class extends the functionality of the AbstractProblemLoader.
ProblemLoaderControl
Allows to observe and control the loading performed by an AbstractProblemLoader.
ProblemLoaderException
 
ProblemTypeInformation
 
Profile
This interface provides methods that allow to customize KeY for certain applications.
ProfileNameInStatusBar
 
Program
 
ProgramConstant
This class represents currently only static final fields initialised with a compile time constant.
ProgramConstruct
A type that implement this interface can be used in all java programs instead of an expression or statement.
ProgramContextAdder
A context given as ContextStatementBlockInstantiation is wrapped around a given ProgramElement.
ProgramElement
A part of the program syntax that carries semantics in the model.
ProgramElementName
represents a name that is part of a program
ProgramElementReplacer
 
ProgramInLogic
represents something in logic that originates from a program like queries, program variables and therefore has a KeYJavaType
ProgramMethod
The program method represents a (pure) method in the logic.
ProgramMethodFinder
Simple visitor to find instances of non-model ProgramMethod in terms.
ProgramMethodPO
This proof obligation executes an IProgramMethod with an optional precondition.
ProgramMethodPOLoader
 
ProgramMethodSubsetPO
This proof obligation executes selected statements of the body of a given IProgramMethod.
ProgramMethodSubsetPOLoader
 
ProgramModelElement
An entity of the program meta model.
ProgramPrefix
this interface is implemented by program elements that may be matched by the inactive program prefix
ProgramPrefixUtil
 
ProgramPrefixUtil.ProgramPrefixInfo
 
ProgramReplaceVisitor
Walks through a java AST in depth-left-fist-order.
ProgramSV
Objects of this class are schema variables matching program constructs within modal operators.
ProgramSVCollector
This visitor is used to collect all appearing SchemaVariables in a java program
ProgramSVSort
Special "sorts" used for schema variables matching program constructs (class ProgramSV).
ProgramSVSort.SimpleExpressionNonStringObjectSort
This sort represents a type of program schema variables that match on non string object variables.
ProgramSVSort.SimpleExpressionStringSort
This sort represents a type of program schema variables that match on string literals and string variables.
ProgramTransformer
ProgramTransformers are used to describe schematic transformations that cannot be expressed by the taclet language itself.
ProgramVariable
The objects of this class represent program variables and program constants (resulting from static final declarations in programs; TODO: it is weird that constants are a special case of variables).
ProgramVariableCollection
A collection of all program variables needed to translate a textual JML specification case.
ProgramVariableCollector
Walks through a java AST in depth-left-fist-order.
ProgramVariableName
 
ProgramVariableReferencesAnalyst
Extracts read and write access to fields (IProgramVariable) via assignments.
ProgressDialog
Dialog showing launched SMT processes and results.
ProgressDialog.Modus
Current state of the dialog.
ProgressDialog.ProgressDialogListener
 
ProgressMonitor
An interface to some progress reporting mechanism.
ProgressMonitor.Empty
A progress monitor that does nothing.
ProgVarReplacer
Replaces program variables.
ProgVarReplaceVisitor
Walks through a java AST in depth-left-first-order.
ProjectionToTerm<Goal>
 
Proof
A proof is represented as a tree whose nodes are created by applying rules on the current (open) goals and dividing them up into several new subgoals.
ProofAggregate
 
ProofAggregateTask
 
ProofAlreadyClosedException
Thrown if during the execution of a command, the proof is already closed.
ProofBundleHandler
Provides methods to collect paths of files inside a proof bundle.
ProofBundleHandler.TreeFileVisitor
A FileVisitor for creating a file tree from the visited paths.
ProofBundleMerger
 
ProofBundleSaver
This class is responsible for saving (zipped) proof bundles.
ProofCachingSettings
Settings for the proof caching functionality.
ProofClosedJTextPaneDisplay
Displays a JOptionPane informing about a closed proof and gives some statistics.
ProofClosedNotification
The proof closed notification notifies the user about a successful attempt closing a proof.
ProofClosedNotificationEvent
NotificationEvent used to inform the user about a closed proof.
ProofControl
A ProofControl provides the user interface independent logic to apply rules on a proof.
ProofCorrectnessMgt
 
ProofDependentSMTSettings
 
ProofDifference
 
ProofDiffFrame
Proof-of-concept implementation of a textual sequent comparison.
ProofDiffFrame.Action
The action to show a new frame of this class.
ProofDisposedEvent
An event thrown by a Proof and observed via a ProofDisposedListener.
ProofDisposedListener
Observes a Proof.
ProofEnvironment
The unique environment a proof is performed in.
ProofEnvironmentEvent
 
ProofEnvironmentListener
 
ProofEvent
an object indicating that a proof event has happpend
ProofExplorationService
ExplorationAction that handles the addition of formulas to the sequent.
ProofGoal<G>
 
ProofIndependentSettings
Top of the proof independent settings.
ProofIndependentSMTSettings
 
ProofIndependentSMTSettings.ProgressMode
 
ProofInfo
 
ProofInitServiceUtil
Provides static utility methods to get the following service: POExtension listed at META-INF/services/de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init.POExtension DefaultProfileResolver listed at META-INF/services/de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init.DefaultProfileResolver
ProofInputException
Reading prover input failed
ProofIrrelevancyProperty
A property that can be used in EqualsModProperty.equalsModProperty(Object, Property, Object[]) for terms.
ProofJavaSourceCollection
This collection represents the set containing URIs of all Java source files relevant to a given Proof.
ProofLoadUserAction
Virtual user action to undo loading a proof.
ProofMacro
The interface ProofMacro is the entry point to a general strategy extension system.
ProofMacro.ProgressBarListener
This observer acts as intermediate instance between the reports by the strategy and the UI reporting progress.
ProofMacroFinishedInfo
An information object with additional information about the finished proof macro.
ProofMacroListener
Listener for the application of proof macros (which may be run in a separate worker thread).
ProofMacroMenu
This class provides the user interface to the macro extensions.
ProofMacroUserAction
User action to apply a proof macro.
ProofMacroWorker
The Class ProofMacroWorker is a swing worker for the application of proof macros.
ProofManagementAction
Shows the proof management dialog
ProofManagementDialog
 
ProofManagementException
 
ProofManagementExt
 
ProofModifyingUserAction
User action that modifies the proof in some way.
ProofObject<G>
 
ProofObligationCreator
Creates for a given set of taclets the corresponding set of proof obligation.
ProofObligationLoader
Interface for writing the handling of the creation of proof obligations.
ProofObligationSelector
Created by weigl on 17.08.16.
ProofObligationVars
 
ProofOblInput
Represents something that produces an input proof obligation for the prover.
ProofReferenceUtil
This class provides static methods to compute proof references.
ProofReplayer
A short little hack, but completely working and fast, for replaying proofs inside KeY files.
ProofRuleUserAction
User action that represents the manual application of a rule.
ProofSaver
Saves a proof and provides useful methods for pretty printing terms or programs.
ProofSaverEvent
An event thrown by a ProofSaver.
ProofSaverListener
Listens for changes on ProofSaver instances.
ProofScriptArgument
 
ProofScriptCommand
 
ProofScriptEngine
 
ProofScriptEngine.EchoMessage
 
ProofScriptEngine.ExecuteInfo
 
ProofScriptEngine.Message
 
ProofScriptEntry
This struct encapsulate the information of a proofscript found in key files.
ProofScriptFromFileAction
The Class ProofScriptFromFileAction.
ProofScriptInputAction
The Class ProofScriptInputAction.
ProofScriptWorker
Executes s given script.
ProofSearchInformation<P,G>
 
ProofSelectionDialog
This dialog allows the user to select the proof to load from a proof bundle.
ProofServices
 
ProofSettings
This class is used to load and save settings for proofs such as which data type models are used to represent the java types.
ProofStarter
This class encapsulates the registration of a proof for a given problem.
ProofStarter.UserProvidedInput
Proof obligation for a given formula or sequent
ProofStatus
 
ProofTreeAdapter
An abstract adapter class for receiving proof tree events.
ProofTreeEvent
Encapsulates information describing changes to a proof tree, and used to notify proof tree listeners of the change.
ProofTreeListener
 
ProofTreePopupFactory
Factory for popup menus on proof nodes in the ProofTreeView.
ProofTreePopupFactory.ProofTreeAction
 
ProofTreePopupFactory.ProofTreeContext
 
ProofTreeSettingsMenuFactory
Factory for the settings menu of the ProofTreeView.
ProofTreeView
The proof tree view, showing the nodes of the proof.
ProofTreeViewFilter
Filters for the proof tree view.
ProofUserManager
This singleton class is used to manage user of a Proof to make sure that a Proof is only disposed via Proof.dispose() if it is no longer in use (no user available).
ProofVisitor
 
Properties
 
Properties.Property<T>
 
Properties.PropertyListener
 
PropertiesUtil
 
Property<T>
 
PropositionalExpansionMacro
The macro PropositionalExpansionMacro apply rules to decompose propositional toplevel formulas; but does not split the goal.
PropositionalExpansionWithSimplificationMacro
 
ProspectivePartner
Represents the partners of a join operation.
Protected
Protected.
ProverCore<P,G>
 
ProverTaskListener
 
ProxySort
 
PruneProofAction
This action is one part of the previous UndoLastStepAction: It prunes the proof tree below the selected node.
PseudoInput
Graph node used if a rule application did not use any input formulas.
PseudoOutput
Graph node used if a rule application did not produce any outputs.
Public
Public.
PurePosDPathFeature
Binary feature that returns zero iff the find-formula of a rule contains a d-path consisting only of positive literals (as a formula of the antecedent).
QualifierWrapper<T>
This class is a wrapper primarily used in logic operations where qualifiers, i.e., objects that partly define a function but are not part of the syntax tree, are referenced multiple times, such as in ObserverFunction and SortDependingFunction.
QuanEliminationAnalyser
 
QuantifiableVariable
 
Quantifier
The two objects of this class represent the universal and the existential quantifier, respectively.
QuantifierHandler
This SMT translation handler takes care of quantifier formulas using existential or universal quantifiers.
QuantifierHandler
This handles translation of quantifiers.
QueryAxiom
A class axiom that connects an observer symbol representing a Java method (i.e., an object of type IProgramMethod), with the corresponding method body.
QueryExpand
The QueryExpand rule allows to apply contracts or to symbolically execute a query expression in the logic.
QueryExpandCost
A Feature that computes the cost for using the query expand rule.
QuerySideProofRule
A BuiltInRule which evaluates a query in a side proof.
QueueRuleApplicationManager
Implementation of RuleApplicationManager that stores possible RuleApps in a priority queue.
QuickLoadAction
Load the file saved at the location described by QuickSaveAction.
QuickSaveAction
Immediately saves the currently selected proof to a temporaly location.
RandomName
 
Range
A class specifying a range of integer numbers e.g.
RealLDT
Complete this class if you want to add support for the JML \real type.
RealLiteral
JML \real literal.
ReattachLoopInvariant
Construct for re-attaching a loop invariant that otherwise would get lost after a transformation, for instance, the loop scope-based unwinding rule.
RecAndExistentiallyConnectedClausesFeature
Binary Term Feature return zero if root is a CNF quantifier formula with several clauses.
RecentFileMenu
This class offers a mechanism to manage recent files; it adds the necessary menu items to a menu or even can provide that menu itself.
RecognitionException
 
RecSubTermFeature
 
ReduceMonomialsProjection
Projection for dividing one monomial by another.
ReducibleMonomialsFeature
Return zero iff the monomial dividendSV can be made smaller (in the polynomial reduction ordering) by adding or subtracting divisorSV
Reference
References are uses of names, variables or members.
ReferencePrefix
Reference prefix.
ReferenceSearchButton
Status line button to indicate whether cached goals are present.
ReferenceSearchDialog
Dialog showing reference search information.
ReferenceSearchDialogListener
Interface to receive callbacks from the ReferenceSearchDialog.
ReferenceSearcher
Utility class for proof caching.
ReferenceSuffix
Reference suffix.
ReflectionClassCreator
Creates the RFL.java file, that provides setter and getter methods using the reflection API as well as object creation functions based on the objenesis library.
RegroupSequentPrintFilter
 
RemoveCachingInformationAction
Action to remove caching information on a goal closed by caching.
RemoveInCheckBranchesTermLabelRefactoring
This TermLabelRefactoring removes the supported TermLabel in check branches.
RemoveParentUpdateModifier
If the parent operator of the find term is an update application, then change the position (on which the checkers are applied) to the parent operator.
RenameTable
 
RenamingSourceElementProperty
A property that can be used in EqualsModProperty.equalsModProperty(Object, Property, Object[]) for SourceElements.
RenamingTable
 
RenamingTermProperty
A property that can be used in EqualsModProperty.equalsModProperty(Object, Property, Object[]) for terms.
ReplacementMap<S,T>
A map to be used in an OpReplacer.
ReplacementMap<S>
A map from some type to the same type.
ReplacementMap.DefaultReplacementMap<S,T>
The replacement map type to use if TermLabelSettings.getUseOriginLabels() is false.
ReplacementMap.NoIrrelevantLabelsReplacementMap<S,T>
The replacement map type to use if TermLabelSettings.getUseOriginLabels() is true.
ReplaceWhileLoop
This visitor is used to identify and replace the while loop in invariant rule.
ReplayChecker
Checks that all files stored in the bundle can successfully be replayed.
RepresentsAxiom
A class axiom corresponding to a JML* represents clause.
ResolvedLogicalType
 
ResponsibleStrategyCache
 
ResultsAndCondition
The return value of a side proof.
Return
Return.
RewriteCommand
This class provides the command rewrite.
RewriteCommand.Parameters
Parameters for the RewriteCommand
RewriteTaclet
A RewriteTaclet represents a taclet, whose find can be matched against any term in the sequent no matter where it occurs.
RewriteTacletBuilder<T>
class builds RewriteTaclet objects.
RewriteTacletBuilderSchemaVarCollector
 
RewriteTacletExecutor
 
RewriteTacletGoalTemplate
this class inherits from TacletGoalTemplate.
RightMouseClickToggleAction
 
RigidnessException
this exception is thrown if non-rigid instantiation has been given for a schema variable only allowing rigid instantiations
RootsGenerator
Term generator for inferring the range of values that a variable can have from a given non-linear (in)equation.
Rule
This interface has to be implemented by all classes that want to act as a rule in the calculus.
Rule
 
RuleAbortException
 
RuleApp
 
RuleAppContainer
Container for RuleApp instances with cost as determined by a given Strategy.
RuleAppCost
 
RuleAppCostCollector
Interface for collecting RuleApps, together with their assigned cost.
RuleAppIndex
manages the possible application of rules (RuleApps)
RuleAppInfo
More specific information about a rule application: the original proof node and the new proof node(s) created by this rule application.
RuleApplicationManager<G>
 
RuleAppListener
This listener is notified whenever a rule is applied in an ongoing proof.
RuleAppUtil
Utilities for working with rule applications.
RuleCollection
This class contains the standard rules provided by a profile.
RuleCommand
Command that applies a calculus rule All parameters are passed as strings and converted by the command.
RuleCommand.Parameters
 
RuleCompletionHandler
Instances of this class are used by an AbstractProofControl to complete a Rule completion.
RuleExecutor
Executes a Rule with respect to a given instantiation of the schemavariables.
RuleExecutor<Goal>
 
RuleFilter
 
RuleIndex<Application>
 
RuleJustification
 
RuleJustificationByAddRules
 
RuleJustificationBySpec
 
RuleJustificationInfo
 
RuleKey
Provides a unique key for taclets based on a taclet's name and its taclet options.
RuleSet
 
RuleSetDispatchFeature
Feature for relating rule sets with feature terms.
RuleSource
 
RuleSourceFactory
 
RuleSpecificTask
Instances of this class provides functionality only if a supported rule is active.
RuleStatistics
Simple data object to store a mapping of rules to various counters.
RuleStatistics.RuleStatisticEntry
Usage statistic of a rule.
RuleStatistics.StatisticEntry
Usage statistic of a rule.
RuleStatisticsDialog
Dialog that displays the results of the dependency analysis algorithm.
RunAllProofsAction
This class provides an action for KeY UI which runs a set of specified proof files automatically.
RunStrategyOnNodeUserAction
User action to start auto mode on a specific goal.
SameObserverCondition
A variable condition that is satisfied if the two arguments are schema variables, their instantiations are terms of observer functions, with the same function, which as exactly one heap argument and has got a dependency contract ,
SaveBundleAction
Saves the currently selected proof as a zip archive with file extension "zproof".
SaveFileAction
Saves the current selected proof.
SaveInstCommand
Special "Let" usually to be applied immediately after a manual rule application.
SaveNewNameCommand
Special "Let" usually to be applied immediately after a manual rule application.
SaveNewNameCommand.Parameters
 
ScaleFeature
 
SchematicFieldReference
Field reference.

Iterates reverse preorder over the whole tree starting at a given Node.
SearchNodeReversePreorderIterator
Iterates reverse preorder over the whole tree starting at a given Node.

SearchSequentPrintFilter
This is an interface for filters that are used to modify the sequent view, improving the search function.
SelectCommand
 
SelectCommand.Parameters
 
SelectionBackAction
Action to show the previously selected proof node.
SelectionForwardAction
Action to navigate forward in proof node selection history.
SelectionHistory
Traces the proof nodes selected by the user.
SelectionHistoryChangeListener
Simple interface to be notified about all changes to the selection history.
SelfcomposedLoopSnippet
 
SelfcompositionStateExpansionMacro
The macro SelfcompositionStateExpansionMacro applies rules to extract the self-composed states after the merge of the symbolic execution goals which is included in the proof obligation generation from information flow contracts.

Semisequent
 
SemisequentChangeInfo
 
SemisequentTacletAppIndex
This class holds TermTacletAppIndexs for all formulas of a semisequent.
SendFeedbackAction
Action that executes if "Send Feedback..." was pressed.
SeqConcat
 
SeqContainsExecutableCodeFeature
 
SeqDefHandler
This handler handles the seqDef binder function specially.
SeqDefHandler
Handles translation of seqDef function.
SeqGet
Represents a sequence getter function.
SeqIndexOf
Represents a function giving the index of some element in a sequence (if it exists).

SeqLength
Represents a function giving the length of a sequence.

Sequence

SequentHideWarningBorder
A special purpose border that prints a warning window if the search bar filtering removes formulas from the display.

SequentialProofMacro
The abstract class SequentialProofMacro can be used to create compound macros which sequentially apply macros one after the other.
SequentKit
 
SequentPrintFilter
Filter a given sequent to prepare it for the SequentPrinter class by adjusting constraints, deleting formulas, etc.
SequentPrintFilterEntry
One element of a sequent as delivered by SequentPrintFilter

SequentViewInputListener
This class implements all input listener interfaces for SequentView.

The menu shown by a SequentViewListener when the user clicks on a SequentView.

ServiceCaches
Instances of this class provides all caches used by an individual Proof or more precise by its Services.
Services
This is a collection of common services to the KeY prover.

SessionCaches
 
SetCommand
 
SetCommand.Parameters
 
SetEchoCommand
A simple "echo" command for giving feedback to human observers during lengthy executions.
SetEchoCommand.Parameters
 
SetFailOnClosedCommand
Sets the behavior if an already closed proof is encountered: Either throw an exception (default behavior, sensible for specially tailored scripts for which a prematurely closed proof is unexpected) or peacefully terminate (if the script addresses different problems of different complexity in a try-and-error manner, etc.).
SetFailOnClosedCommand.Parameters
 
SetMinus
 
SetRuleFilter
 
SetsSmallerThanFeature
 
SetStatement
JML set statement
SetStatementBuiltInRuleApp
