invalid reference 
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.statement.SetStatement
SetStatementRule
A rule for set statements.
Settings
This interface is implemented by classes that are used to store settings for different proposes (like active heuristics, which LDTs to use etc.)
SettingsChecker
This class checks if the settings of the given proofs are consistent.
SettingsConverter
Utility class providing various methods to read properties.
SettingsDialog
The settings dialog.
SettingsManager
 
SettingsManager.ShowSettingsAction
 
SettingsPanel
Extension of SimpleSettingsPanel which uses MigLayout to create a nice three-column view.
SettingsProvider
A settings provider is an entry in an SettingsUi.
SettingsTreeModel
A swing model for ShowActiveSettingsAction.
SettingsUi
 
SetUnion
 
SExpr
This class models s-expressions to be used for the SMT translation.
SExpr.Type
An enumeration of the types that an SExpr can assume.
SExprs
This class is a collection of static functions to construct SExpr objects.
ShannonFeature
 
ShannonTermFeature
 
ShiftLeft
Shift left.
ShiftLeftAssignment
Shift left assignment.
ShiftRight
Shift right.
ShiftRightAssignment
Shift right assignment.
ShortcutSettings
UI for configuring the KeyStrokes inside KeY.
ShortUniqueFileNames
Algorithm to construct short unique file names for a set of paths.
ShortUniqueFileNames.Name
Wrapper for a substring of a path
ShowActiveSettingsAction
for debugging - opens a window with the settings from current Proof and the default settings
ShowActiveTactletOptionsAction
Action to show a dialog with the taclet options valid for the currently selected proof.
ShowCreatedByAction
Context menu action to select the proof step that created a formula.
ShowDisplayPane
Actions which display a text should inherit from this abstract notification action.
ShowGraphAction
Context menu action to display the dependency graph "around" a formula.
ShowHashcodesExtension
Extension adapter for showing hash codes for terms.
ShowIcons
 
ShowInteractiveBranchesAction
 
ShowKnownTypesAction
 
ShowNodeInfoAction
Context menu action to show information on a dependency graph node (incoming / outgoing edges).
ShowOriginAction
Opens a OriginTermLabelVisualizer for the selected term.
ShowProofStatistics
 
ShowProofStatistics.Window
Shows proof statistics and allows the user to save them as HTML or CSV.
ShowSelectedSequentPrintFilter
This filter takes a PosInOccurrence and only shows the sub-formula at that position.
ShowSelectedSequentPrintFilter.Entry
An Entry in accessibility ShowSelectedSequentPrintFilter.
ShowUsedContractsAction
 
SideProofStatistics
Statistics for additional side proofs as, e.g., performed by information flow macro
SideProofStore
The only instance of this class SideProofStore.DEFAULT_INSTANCE is used to manage performed side proofs.
SideProofStore.Entry
An SideProofStore.Entry of a SideProofStore.
SideProofStoreEvent
An event thrown by a SideProofStore and observed via an ISideProofStoreListener.
SideProofUtil
 
SignAnalysisDomainElem
A domain element for sign analysis.
SignAnalysisLattice
A lattice for sign analysis of integers.
SimilarParametricFunctionInstruction
 
SimilarSortDependingFunctionInstruction
 
SimpleFileRepo
This FileRepo is able to build a proof bundle but is not able to guarantee consistency between the saved proof and the source code because it does not cache the source code.
SimpleFilteredStrategy
Trivial implementation of the Strategy interface that uses only the goal time to determine the cost of a RuleApp.
SimplePipe
This class represents a simplified version of the existing pipe.
SimplePredicateAbstractionDomainElement
An abstract domain element for a predicate abstraction lattice encapsulating exactly one abstraction predicate.
SimplePredicateAbstractionLattice
A lattice for all predicates accepting the given sort.
SimpleSettingsPanel
A simple panel for using inside of the SettingsUi.
SimpleTacletSelectionMenu
This simple taclet menu displays the user a list of applicable taclets and lets select her/him one of those.
SimplifiedSelectTermFeature
 
SimplifyBetaCandidateFeature
Binary feature that returns zero iff the hyper-tableaux simplification method approves the given application (which is supposed to be the application of a beta rule).
SimplifyIfThenElseUpdateCondition
 
SimplifyTermProfile
An extended JavaProfile used in side proofs to simplify a JTerm.
SimplifyTermStrategy
Strategy used to simplify JTerms in side proofs.
SimplifyTermStrategy.Factory
The StrategyFactory to create instances of SimplifyTermStrategy.
SingleLineComment
Any non-SingleLineComment is a multi line comment.
SingleProof
 
SingleRenamingTable
 
SingleRuleApplicationInfo
 
SingleThreadProblemLoader
This single threaded problem loader is used by the Eclipse integration of KeY.
Singleton
 
SingletonLabelFactory<T>
A factory for creating singleton TermLabel.
SkeletonGenerator
 
SkipCommand
 
SkipMacro
This macro does nothing and is not applicable.
SkolemTermSV
Schema variable that is instantiated with fresh Skolem constants.
SLAttributeResolver
Resolver for attributes (i.e., fields).
SLEnvInput
EnvInput for standalone specification language front ends.
SLExceptionFactory
Factory for exception during parsing of specification languages.
SLExpression
This class represents the translation of an expression of an arbitrary specification language, which in the KeY world is either a term or a type.
SLExpressionResolver
Expression resolvers are used by specification parsers (e.g.
SliceToFixedPointDialog
Dialog to monitor slicing progress.
SlicingExtension
Proof slicing extension.
SlicingLeftPanel
Panel of the proof slicing extension.
SlicingProofReplayer
Proof slicer: constructs a new proof based on the original proof by omitting some steps that are not required to complete the proof (as indicated by the provided analysis results).
SlicingSettings
Settings for the proof slicing extension.
SlicingSettingsProvider
Settings for the proof slicing extension.
SLMethodResolver
Resolver for method calls in specifications.
Slow
Category for slow test cases, that should only consider on Jenkins (merge request and main).
SLParameters
Wraps a list of expressions.
SLResolverManager
Resolves property calls of any kind.
SLTranslationException
 
SLTypeResolver
Resolves types occurring explicitly in specification expressions (e.g.
SLWarningException
 
SmallerThanFeature
Abstract superclass for features comparing terms (in particular polynomials or monomials) using the term ordering

SMTAppIntermediate
 
SMTBeautifier
Simple routine to prettyprint an SMT2 input.

SMTCommand.SMTCommandArguments
 
SMTFile
 
SMTFocusResults
Compute unsat core from SMT problems and hide all irrelevant formulas from sequent.
SMTFunction
 
SMTFunctionDef
 
SMTHandler
General interface for routines that translate particular KeY data structures to SMT.
SMTHandler.Capability
An enumeration of the possible answers of an handler to the SMTHandler.canHandle(Term) method.
SMTHandlerProperty<T>
SMT handler properties are properties for the new modular smt handler.
SMTHandlerProperty.BooleanProperty
A property of type boolean.
SMTHandlerProperty.EnumProperty<E>
A property for an enum type.
SMTHandlerProperty.IntegerProperty
A property of type int.
SMTHandlerProperty.StringProperty
A property of type String.
SMTHandlerPropertyVisitor<A,R>
Visitor pattern for SMTHandlerProperty objects.
SMTHandlerServices
This class provides some infrastructure to the smt translation process.
SMTInvokeAction
This action is responsible for the invocation of an SMT solver For example the toolbar button is parameterized with an instance of this action
SmtLib2Translator
The translation for the SMT2-format.
SMTObjTranslator
 
SMTOptionsAction
creates a menu allowing to choose the external prover to be used
SMTPreparationMacro
A macro that performs all simplifications that are necessary in order to perform a translation of the sequent to SMT.
SMTProblem
Represents a problem that can be passed to a solver.
SMTProofApplyUserAction
User action to apply the results of running SMT solvers.
SMTRule
 
SMTRuleApp
The rule application that is used when a goal is closed by means of an SMT solver.
SMTSettings
 
SMTSettingsProvider
General SMT settings panel in the settings dialog.
SMTSolver
The SMTSolver interface represents a solver process (e.g.
SMTSolver.ReasonOfInterruption
Possible reasons for why a solver process was interrupted/stopped.
SMTSolver.SolverState
A solver process can have differnt states.
SMTSolverImplementation
Represents a concrete instance of a running solver process on the KeY side.
SMTSolverResult
Encapsulates the result of a single solver.
SMTSolverResult.ThreeValuedTruth
This enum represents the three possible outcomes of an external SMT solver call.
SMTSort

This class uses the existing taclet translation technology to translate taclets to smt axioms.

SMTTranslator
Classes that implement this interface provide a translation of a KeY-problem into a specific format.
SolverCommunication
Stores the communication between KeY and an external solver: Contains a list that stores the messages that have been sent from the solver to KeY and vice versa.
SolverCommunication.Message
Represents a single message sent from or to the solver.
SolverCommunication.MessageType
The message type depends on the channel which was used for sending the message.
SolverException
Encapsulates all exceptions that have occurred while executing the solvers.
SolverLauncher
IN ORDER TO START THE SOLVERS USE THIS CLASS.
There are two cases how the solvers can be started:

1.
SolverLauncherListener
This interface can be used to observe a launcher.
SolverListener
 
SolverListener
 
SolverListener.ContainsModalityOrQueryVisitor
Utility class used to check whether a term contains constructs that are not handled by the SMT translation.
SolverListener.InternSMTProblem
 
SolverPropertiesLoader
 
SolverType
This interface is used for modeling different solvers.
SolverTypeCollection
Stores a set of solver types.
SolverTypeImplementation
Final SolverType implementation that uses building blocks for the various methods.
SolverTypes
Facade for the management of SolverType.
Sort
 
SortCollector
 
SortComparisonFeature<Goal>
 
SortDependingFunction
The objects of this class represent families of function symbols, where each family contains an instantiation of a template symbol for a particular sort.
SortDependingFunctionHandler
Handles translation of sort depending functions
Sorted
 
Sorted
 
SortedOperator
 
SortException
this exception is thrown from an "SVInstantiations"-Object if the sorts of a schema variable and its instantiation are not compatible (and not generic)
SortExtendsTransTermFeature
 
SortHierarchy
The SortHierarchy works as a wrapper class for sorts.
SortImpl
Abstract base class for implementations of the Sort interface.
SortLDT
 
SortMismatchException
 
SortNode
Represents a node in the class hierarchy.
SourceData
This class keeps track of the next element to match, which is provided by calling method SourceData.getSource().
SourceElement
A source element is a piece of syntax.
SourceHighlightDocument
This document knows about syntax highlighting.
SourceHighlightDocument.EditorLexer
An editor lexer is a function that takes a string and returns a list of tokens that describe the syntax highlighting of the string.
SourceHighlightDocument.Token
Tokens are the entities returned by the lexer.
SourceView
This class is responsible for showing the source code and visualizing the symbolic execution path of the currently selected node.
SourceView.Highlight
An object of this class represents a highlight of a specific line in the SourceView.
SourceViewFrame
This frame contains the SourceView.
SpecExtractor
Extracts specifications from comments.
SpecialConstructorCall
The constructor call meta construct is used to handle a allocation expression like new Class(...).
SpecialConstructorReference
Occurs in a constructor declaration as the first statement as this(...) or super(...) reference.
SpecificationElement
Common superinterface of all constructs created by the specification language front ends and managed by SpecificationRepository.
SpecificationRepository
Central storage for all specification elements, such as contracts, class axioms, and loop invariants.
SpecificationRepository.JmlStatementSpec
This record represents information which are necessary to evaluate JML statements.
SpecificationRepositoryWD
A special variant of
SpecMathMode
Spec math modes
SplittableQuantifiedFormulaFeature
 
SquigglyUnderlinePainter
A highlight painter for drawing a squiggly line under the selection.
StandardUISettings
 
StartAuxiliaryBlockComputationMacro
 
StartAuxiliaryComputationMacro
 
StartAuxiliaryLoopComputationMacro
 
StartAuxiliaryMethodComputationMacro
 
StartSideProofMacro
 
StateChangeListener
Listener object to record various user actions (currently only rule applications) in the undo buffer.
StateExpansionAndInfFlowContractApplicationMacro
 
Statement
Statement.
StatementBlock
Statement block.
StatementContainer
Statement container.
StatementWellDefinedness
A contract for checking the well-definedness of a jml statement.
StateVars
Prepare program and location variables.
Static
Static.
StaticFeatureCollection
Collection of strategy features that can be accessed statically.
StaticFieldCondition
This variable condition checks if the instantiation of a schemavariable (of type Field) refers to a Java field declared as "static".
StaticInitialisation
 
StaticMethodCondition
ensures that the given instantiation for the schemavariable denotes a static method.
StaticReferenceCondition
ensures that the given instantiation for the schemavariable denotes a static field
Statistics
Instances of this class encapsulate statistical information about proofs, such as the number of nodes, or the number of interactions.
StayOnFormulaTermLabelPolicy
This TermLabelPolicy maintains a FormulaTermLabel on predicates.
StayOnOperatorTermLabelPolicy
This TermLabelPolicy maintains a TermLabel as long the new JTerm has the same Operator as the previous best matching JTerm from which it was created.
StdDialog
A dialog offering three buttons at the lower border: Help (optional), Okay and Cancel.
StepOverSymbolicExecutionTreeNodesStopCondition
This StopCondition stops the auto mode when a "step over" is completed.
StepReturnSymbolicExecutionTreeNodesStopCondition
This StopCondition stops the auto mode when a "step over" is completed.
StopCondition<G>
 
StopRequest
 
StoreStmtInCondition
Stores the given Statement, after substitution of SchemaVariables, into the given ProgramSV for later use in other conditions and transformers.
StoreTermInCondition
Stores the given JTerm, after substitution of SchemaVariables, into the given SchemaVariable for later use in other conditions and transformers.
Strategy<Goal>
Generic interface for evaluating the cost of a RuleApp with regard to a specific strategy
StrategyFactory
Interface for creating Strategy instances.
StrategyInfoUndoMethod
 
StrategyProofMacro
The abstract class StrategyProofMacro can be used to define proof macros which use their own strategy.
StrategyProperties
 
StrategyPropertyValueDefinition
Defines a single value a user can select in the user interface control defined by a OneOfStrategyPropertyDefinition.
StrategySelectionView
This JPanel allows to edit the StrategyProperties of the JavaCardDLStrategy.
StrategySettings
 
StrategySettingsDefinition
Instances of this class defines how a user interfaces has to look like which edits StrategySettings.
StrategySettingsDefinition.StrategySettingEntry
This class represents an attribute in the strategy settings.
Streams
 
StrictFp
Strict fp.
StringBackend<M>
A Backend which appends all output to a StringBuffer.
StringLiteral
 
Strings
Helper functions for Strings
StringStrategy
 
StringStrategyFactory
 
StringUtil
Provides static methods to work with strings.
Style
 
Style.Tooltip
Wrapper class for the tooltip
Style.Tooltip.Fragment
wrapper class for additional infos
Styler<T>
A Styler is a part of a strategy to implement a flexible mechanism for the representation of elements.
SubFormulaCondition
This variable condition checks if an instantiation for a formula has sub formulas which are formulas.
Substitution
This class decribes a substitution,which store a map(varMap) from quantifiable variable to a term(instance).
SubstOp
Standard first-order substitution operator, resolving clashes but not preventing (usually unsound) substitution of non-rigid terms across modal operators.
SubTermFeature
 
SubtermGenerator<Goal>
 
SubtermProjection
Projection for computing a subterm of a given term.
Subtype
Subtype
SuccTaclet
A SuccTaclet represents a taclet whose find part has to match a top level formula in the succedent of the sequent.
SuccTacletBuilder
class builds SuccTaclet objects.
SuccTacletExecutor
 
SumFeature
 
SumProdHandler
 
SuperArrayDeclaration
At the moment the mere purpose of this Class is to provide an encapsulation for the length attribute.
SuperConstructorReference
Super constructor reference.
SuperReference
Super reference.
SuperTermGenerator
 
SupportedTaclets
Change this file if you want to change the set of taclets that can be used for external provers.
SupportedTaclets.Category
The category of taclets.
SupportedTaclets.TreeItem
TreeItem represents the user data in a tree model.
SupportedTaclets.TreeItem.SelectionMode
 
SVInstantiationCP
Feature representing a ChoicePoint for instantiating a schema variable of a taclet with the term that is returned by a ProjectionToTerm.
SVInstantiationException
 
SVInstantiationExceptionWithPosition
Represents an exception with position information.
SVInstantiationParserException
 
SVInstantiationProjection
Projection of taclet apps to the instantiation of a schema variable.
SVInstantiations
This class wraps an ImmutableMap from SchemaVariable to InstantiationEntry and is used to store instantiations of schemavariables.
SVInstantiations
 
SVInstantiations.UpdateLabelPair
 
SVNameCorrespondenceCollector
This visitor is used to collect information about schema variable pairs occurring within the same substitution operator within a taclet.
SVNeedsInstantiation
 
SVRigidnessException
 
SwingUtil
Utilities for working with Swing.
Switch
Switch.
SwitchToIf
This class is used to perform program transformations needed for the symbolic execution of a switch-case statement.
SymbolicAssociation
Default implementation of ISymbolicAssociation.
SymbolicEquivalenceClass
Default implementation of ISymbolicEquivalenceClass.
SymbolicExecutionBreakpointStopCondition
An IBreakpointStopCondition which can be used during symbolic execution.
SymbolicExecutionEnvironment<U>
Instances of this class are used to collect and access all relevant information for symbolic execution tree extraction of Proofs via an SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder.
SymbolicExecutionExceptionBreakpoint
ThisSymbolicExecutionExceptionBreakpoint represents an exception breakpoint and is responsible to tell the debugger to stop execution when the respective breakpoint is hit.
SymbolicExecutionGoalChooser
This GoalChooser is a special implementation of the default DepthFirstGoalChooser.
SymbolicExecutionGoalChooserFactory
This GoalChooserFactory creates a special GoalChooser for symbolic execution.
SymbolicExecutionJavaProfile
An extended JavaProfile used by the symbolic execution API.
SymbolicExecutionJavaProfileDefaultProfileResolver
A DefaultProfileResolver which returns SymbolicExecutionJavaProfile.getDefaultInstance().
SymbolicExecutionPO
 
SymbolicExecutionSideProofUtil
Provides utility methods for side proofs.
SymbolicExecutionSideProofUtil.ContainsIrrelevantThingsVisitor
Utility class used by SymbolicExecutionSideProofUtil.containsIrrelevantThings(Services, SequentFormula, Set).
SymbolicExecutionSideProofUtil.ContainsModalityOrQueryVisitor
Utility method used by SymbolicExecutionSideProofUtil.containsModalityOrQuery(Term)
SymbolicExecutionState
A symbolic execution state is a pair of a symbolic state in form of a parallel update, and a path condition in form of a JavaDL formula.
SymbolicExecutionStateWithProgCnt
A symbolic execution state with program counter is a triple of a symbolic state in form of a parallel update, a path condition in form of a JavaDL formula, and a program counter in form of a JavaDL formula with non-empty Java Block (and a possible post condition as first, and only, sub term).
SymbolicExecutionStrategy
Strategy to use for symbolic execution.
SymbolicExecutionStrategy.Factory
The StrategyFactory to create instances of SymbolicExecutionStrategy.
SymbolicExecutionTermLabel
Label attached to a symbolic execution thread.
SymbolicExecutionTermLabelFactory
A factory for creating SymbolicExecutionTermLabel objects.
SymbolicExecutionTermLabelUpdate
Makes sure that the ID of SymbolicExecutionTermLabels is increased when a WhileInvariantRule is applied.
SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder
Instances of this class are used to extract the symbolic execution tree from a normal KeY's proof tree.
SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder.JavaPair
Utility class to group a call stack size with an ImmutableList of SourceElement with the elements of interest.
SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder.SymbolicExecutionCompletions
Instances of this class are returned by SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder.analyse() to inform about newly completed blocks and returned methods.
SymbolicExecutionUtil
Provides utility methods for symbolic execution with KeY.
SymbolicExecutionUtil.ContractPostOrExcPostExceptionVariableResult
The result of SymbolicExecutionUtil.searchContractPostOrExcPostExceptionVariable(Node, Services).
SymbolicExecutionUtil.SiteProofVariableValueInput
Helper class which represents the return value of SymbolicExecutionUtil.createExtractReturnVariableValueSequent(Services, TypeReference, IProgramMethod, ReferencePrefix, Node, Node, IProgramVariable) and SymbolicExecutionUtil.createExtractVariableValueSequent(Services, Node, PosInOccurrence, JTerm, IProgramVariable).
SymbolicLayout
Default implementation of ISymbolicLayout.
SymbolicLayoutExtractor
Instances of this class can be used to compute memory layouts (objects with values and associations to other objects on the heap together with objects and associations to objects on the current state of the stack) which a given Node of KeY's proof tree can have based on equivalence classes (aliasing) of objects.
SymbolicLayoutReader
Allows to read XML files which contains an object model written via an SymbolicLayoutWriter.
SymbolicLayoutReader.AbstractKeYlessAssociationValueContainer
An implementation of ISymbolicAssociationValueContainer which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.
SymbolicLayoutReader.AbstractKeYlessElement
An implementation of ISymbolicElement which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.
SymbolicLayoutReader.KeYlessAssociation
An implementation of ISymbolicAssociation which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.
SymbolicLayoutReader.KeYlessEquivalenceClass
An implementation of ISymbolicEquivalenceClass which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.
SymbolicLayoutReader.KeYlessLayout
An implementation of ISymbolicLayout which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.
SymbolicLayoutReader.KeYlessObject
An implementation of ISymbolicObject which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.
SymbolicLayoutReader.KeYlessState
An implementation of ISymbolicState which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.
SymbolicLayoutReader.KeYlessValue
An implementation of ISymbolicValue which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.
SymbolicLayoutWriter
Allows to persistent selected properties of ISymbolicLayouts as XML file.
SymbolicObject
Default implementation of ISymbolicObject.
SymbolicState
Default implementation of ISymbolicState.
SymbolicValue
Default implementation of ISymbolicValue.
SymExStrategy
 
SymExStrategyFactory
 
Synchronized
Synchronized.
SynchronizedBlock
Synchronized block.
SyntacticalReplaceVisitor
visitor for method Term.execPostOrder(Visitor).
SyntaxElement
 
SyntaxElementCursor
 
SyntaxElementMatchProgramGenerator
This class generates a matching program for a given syntax element that can be interpreted by the virtual machine's interpreter
SyntaxErrorReporter
An ANTLR4 error listener that stores the errors internally.
SyntaxErrorReporter.ParserException
 
SyntaxErrorReporter.SyntaxError
This class represents an ANTLR4 error message.
SyntaxHighlightingToggleAction
 
SystemInfoAction
 
TableRowResizer
A mouse listener for resizing the height of the JTable rows.
TabPanel
 
Taclet
Taclets are the DL-extension of schematic theory specific rules.
Taclet
 
Taclet.TacletLabelHint
Instances of this class are used as hints to maintain TermLabels.
Taclet.TacletLabelHint.TacletOperation
Defines the possible operations a Taclet performs.
TacletAnnotation
 
TacletApp
A TacletApp object contains information required for a concrete application.
TacletAppContainer
Instances of this class are immutable
TacletAppIndex
the class manages the available TacletApps.
TacletAppIntermediate
Encapsulates intermediate information for constructing a taclet application.
TacletApplPart
 
TacletAssumesModel
 
TacletAttributes
 
TacletBuilder<T>
abstract taclet builder class to be inherited from taclet builders specialised for their concrete taclet variant
TacletBuilder.TacletBuilderException
 
TacletBuilderCommand
This interface describes a commands that manipulate taclets during construction in the parser.
TacletBuilderManipulators
This class manages the register of various factories for the different built-in VariableConditions.
TacletExecutor
Encapsulates the application engine of taclets.
TacletExecutor<Goal,App>
 
TacletFilter
 
TacletFindModel
 
TacletFormula
Represents the formula of a taclet.
It provides methods to get the formula and its corresponding taclet.
The setting of the formula and the taclet is dedicated to the constructor of the implementing class.
TacletGenerator
 
TacletGoalTemplate
this class contains the goals of the schematic theory specific rules (Taclet).
TacletGoalTemplate
 
TacletIfSelectionDialog
this dialog appears if a rule is selected to be applied and the rule has an if sequent.
TacletIndex
manages all applicable Taclets (more precisely: Taclets with instantiations but without position information, the NoPosTacletApps) at one node.
TacletIndexKit
Abstract factory for creating TacletIndex instances
TacletInstantiationModel
 
TacletLoader
 
TacletLoader.KeYsTacletsLoader
 
TacletLoader.TacletFromFileLoader
 
TacletMatchCompletionDialog
 
TacletMatcher
Defines the interface for matching terms against the pattern (find) part of a taclet, handling schema variable instantiations and checking variable conditions.
TacletMatcherKit
Abstract factory for the creation of taclet matcher.
TacletOptionsAction
Deprecated.
TacletOptionsSettings
 
TacletOptionsSettings.ChoiceEntry
Represents a choice with all its meta information.
TacletPBuilder
 
TacletPOGenerator
 
TacletPrefix
This class contains the prefix for a Taclet according to M.Gieses paper "Taclet mit Schemavariablen und lokalen Deklarationen" It is used as a data container for the set of all variables bound above the appearance of a SchemaVariable v in a Taclet without all those x not free in v variables
TacletPrefix
 
TacletPrefixBuilder
 
TacletPrefixBuilder.InvalidPrefixException
 
TacletProofObligationInput
The Class TacletProofObligationInput is a special purpose proof obligations for taclet proofs.
TacletProofObligationInputLoader
 
TacletSchemaVariableCollector
Collects all schemavariables occurring in the \find, \assumes part or goal description of a taclet.
TacletSetTranslation
This interface provides the mechanism of translating taclets to formulae.
TacletSoundnessPOLoader
 
TacletSoundnessPOLoader.LoaderListener
 
TacletSoundnessPOLoader.TacletFilter
 
TacletSoundnessPOLoader.TacletInfo
 
TacletTranslationOptions
 
TacletTranslator
 
TacletVariableSVCollector
This class is used to collect all appearing SchemaVariables that are bound in a Taclet.
TacletVisitor
 
TaskFinishedInfo
 
TaskStartedInfo
 
TaskStartedInfo.TaskKind
 
TaskTree
Task tree panel, showing all currently opened proofs.
TaskTreeModel
 
TaskTreeNode
 
TeeReader
A TeeReader writes everything it reads to a separated writer.
TeeWriter
A TeeReader writes everything it writes to a separated writer.
Term
 
TermBuffer
 
TermBuffer<Goal>
 
TermBuilder
Use this class if you intend to build complex terms by hand.
TermConstructionProjection
Term projection for constructing a bigger term from a sequence of direct subterms and an operator.
TermCreationException
 
TermFactory
The TermFactory is the only way to create terms using constructors of class Term or any of its subclasses.
TermFeature
 
TermGenerator<Goal>
 
TermHelper
Provides some helper methods used by classes outside the logic package Please be careful with putting things here.
TerminalProgramElement
Terminal program element.
TerminalSyntaxElement
 
TermLabel
The interface for term labels.
TermLabelCondition
This variable condition checks if an instantiation for term labels contains a specific term label.
TermLabelException
An exception which can be thrown by the term label system.
TermLabelFactory<T>
A factory for creating TermLabel objects.
TermLabelManager
This class provides access to the functionality of term labels.
TermLabelManager.RefactoringsContainer
Utility class used by TermLabelManager.computeRefactorings(TermLabelState, Services, PosInOccurrence, JTerm, Rule, Goal, Object, JTerm)
TermLabelManager.TermLabelConfiguration
Instances of this class are used to group everything which is required to support one specific TermLabel.
TermLabelMenu
This menu can be used to toggle TermLabel visibility for the SequentView.
TermLabelMerger
A TermLabelMerger is used by TermLabelManager.mergeLabels(Services, de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.SequentChangeInfo) to merge TermLabels in case a SequentFormula was rejected to be added to the resulting Sequent.
TermLabelPolicy
A TermLabelPolicy is used by TermLabelManager.instantiateLabels(de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.label.TermLabelState, de.uka.ilkd.key.java.Services, org.key_project.prover.sequent.PosInOccurrence, org.key_project.prover.rules.Rule, org.key_project.prover.rules.RuleApp, de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.Goal, java.lang.Object, de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.JTerm, de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.JTerm) to decide for each TermLabel of an old JTerm if it should be re-added to the new JTerm or not.
TermLabelRefactoring
A TermLabelRefactoring is used by TermLabelManager.refactorGoal(TermLabelState, Services, PosInOccurrence, Rule, Goal, Object, JTerm) to refactor the labels of each visited JTerm.
TermLabelRefactoring.RefactoringScope
Possible refactoring scopes.
TermLabelSettings
Proof-dependent settings for TermLabels.
TermLabelsProperty
A property that can be used in EqualsModProperty.equalsModProperty(Object, Property, Object[]) for terms.
TermLabelState
A TermLabelState is used to share information between participants which manage TermLabels during rule application.
TermLabelSV
A schema variable which matches term labels
TermLabelUpdate
A TermLabelUpdate is used by TermLabelManager.instantiateLabels(TermLabelState, Services, PosInOccurrence, JTerm, Rule, RuleApp, Goal, Object, JTerm, JTerm) to add or remove maintained TermLabels which will be added to the new JTerm.
TermLabelVisibilityManager
 
TermLabelVisibilityManagerEvent
An event thrown by a TermLabelVisibilityManager.
TermLabelVisibilityManagerListener
Observes changes on a TermLabelVisibilityManager.
TermOrdering
Interface for term ordering
TermPredicateTermFeature
 
TermProgramVariableCollector
 
TermProgramVariableCollectorKeepUpdatesForBreakpointconditions
 
TermReplacementMap
A replacement map for terms.
TermServices
This interface defines the basic functionalities of services required to construct JTerms.
TermSmallerThanFeature
Feature that returns zero iff one term is smaller than another term in the current term ordering
TermSV
A schema variable that is used as placeholder for terms.
TermTacletAppIndex
Class whose objects represent an index of taclet apps for one particular position within a formula, and that also contain references to the indices of direct subformulas
TermTacletAppIndexCacheSet
Cache that is used for accelerating TermTacletAppIndex.
TermTransformer
TermTransformer perform complex term transformation which cannot be (efficiently or at all) described by taclets.
TermUtil
 
TestCaseGenerator
 
TestExtension
 
TestGenerationAction
Action which generates test cases for all open nodes.
TestGenerationLifecycleListener
 
TestGenerationSettings
 
TestgenExtension
 
TestgenFacade
 
TestGenMacro
 
TestgenOptionsPanel
 
TestgenUtils
 
TextLineNumber
This class will display line numbers for a related text component.
TextualJMLAssertStatement
A JML assert/assume statement.
TextualJMLAssertStatement.Kind
 
TextualJMLClassAxiom
A JML axiom declaration in textual form.
TextualJMLClassInv
A JML class invariant declaration in textual form.
TextualJMLConstruct
Objects of this type represent the various JML specification constructs in textual, unprocessed form.
TextualJMLDepends
A JML depends / accessible clause for a model field in textual form.
TextualJMLFieldDecl
A JML field or local variable (!) declaration (ghost or model) in textual form.
TextualJMLInitially
A JML initially clause declaration in textual form.
TextualJMLLoopSpec
A JML loop specification (invariant, assignable clause, decreases clause, ...) in textual form.
TextualJMLLoopSpec.ClauseHd
Heap-dependent clauses Note that the name 'assignable' is kept here for legacy reasons.
TextualJMLMergePointDecl
A JML merge point declaration in textual form.
TextualJMLMethodDecl
A JML model method declaration in textual form.
TextualJMLModifierList
A list of JMLModifiers that apply to some class-level element (e.g., field declaration, method declaration).
TextualJMLRepresents
A JML represents clause in textual form.
TextualJMLSetStatement
A JML set statement in textual form.
TextualJMLSpecCase
A JML specification case (i.e., more or less an operation contract) in textual form.
TextualJMLSpecCase.Abbreviation
An abbreviation is a short-name for a term.
TextualJMLSpecCase.Clause
Heap-independent clauses
TextualJMLSpecCase.ClauseHd
Heap-dependent clauses Note that the name 'assignable' is kept here for legacy reasons.
TGInfoDialog
 
TGMain
 
TGPhase
 
TGReporter
Reporter for test case generation.
TGWorker
The worker must be started using method TGWorker.start() and not via the standard SwingWorker.execute().
Then
Then.
ThinBackwardSlicer
Implementation of thin backward slicing.
ThisConstructorReference
This constructor reference.
ThisReference
A reference to the current object.
ThreadUtilities
 
Throw

ThrownExceptionFeature
 
Throws
Throws.
Times
Times.
TimesAssignment
Times assignment.
ToggleConfirmExitAction
 
ToggleExplorationAction
Toggles the Exploration Mode.
ToggleOriginHighlightAction
Action to toggle ViewSettings.isHighlightOrigin().
ToggleProofTreeTooltipAction
Toggles the tooltips of the proof tree.
ToggleSequentViewTooltipAction
Toggles the tooltips on the sequent view.
ToggleSourceViewTooltipAction
Toggles the tooltips of the source view.
ToggleTermOriginTrackingAction
Action to toggle TermLabelSettings.getUseOriginLabels().
ToolTipOptionsAction
 
Top
The Top element of the boolean lattice, representing all booleans (i.e., true and false).
Top
The Top element of the sign lattice, representing all integers.
TopLevelFindFeature
Feature for investigating whether the focus of a rule application is a top-level formula, a top-level formula of the antecedent or a top-level formula of the succedent
TopRuleAppCost
 
TrackedFormula
A sequent formula tracked by the dependency graph.
TransactionStatement
 
TranscendentalFloatSMTMacro
This class captures a proof macro which is meant to fully automise KeY proof workflow.
TransformationPipelineServices
 
TransformationPipelineServices.TransformerCache
Cache of important data.
Transformer
Functions with a restricted/special rule set only applicable for the top level of the term transformer and not directly for its arguments, prohibiting any rule applications to sub arguments as well as applications from outside such as update applications.
Transient
Transient.
TranslatedDependencyContract
The information obtain from an JML accessible clause.
TranslationListener
Listener for the classes which implement TacletTranslator.
TreeSettings
The default implementation of ITreeSettings.
Trigger
 
Trigger
 
TriggeredInstantiations
 
TriggersSet
This class is used to select and store Triggers for a quantified formula in Prenex CNF(PCNF).
TriggerVariableInstantiationProjection
 
TriggerVarInstantiatedFeature
 
TrivialFileRepo
This FileRepo does not cache any files but writes to / reads from the original files on disk.
TrivialMonomialLCRFeature
Return zero of the least common reducible of two monomials is so trivial that it is not necessary to do the critical pair completion
True
The True element of the boolean lattice, representing exactly the boolean true.
TruthValuePOExtension
Implementation of POExtension to support truth value evaluation.
TruthValueTracingUtil
Provides functionality to evaluate the truth value of labeled formulas (predicates and junctors).
TruthValueTracingUtil.BranchResult
Represents the unmodifiable predicate results of a leaf Node (Goal).
TruthValueTracingUtil.MultiEvaluationResult
Instances of this unmodifyable class are used to store the found evaluation results.
TruthValueTracingUtil.TruthValue
Represents the possible truth values.
TruthValueTracingUtil.TruthValueTracingResult
Represents the final predicate evaluation result returned by TruthValueTracingUtil.evaluate(Node, Name, boolean, boolean)
Try
Try.
TryCloseCommand
The script command tryclose" has two optional arguments: steps: INTEGER number of steps to use #2: STRING the number of the branch which should be closed If #2 is not given or not a number, the TryClose macro is applied to all open goals.
TryCloseCommand.TryCloseArguments
 
TryCloseMacro
The Class TryCloseMacro tries to close goals.
TwoState
The JML modifier "two_state".
Type
A program model element representing types.
TypeCast
Type cast.
TypeComparisonCondition
General varcond for checking relationships between types of schema variables.
TypeComparisonCondition.Mode
 
TypeCondition
This variable condition checks if a schemavariable is instantiated with a reference or primitive type
TypeConverter
 
TypeDeclaration
Type declaration.
TypeDeclaration.JMLModifiers
JML modifiers of a type
TypeDeclarationContainer
Type declaration container.
TypeHierarchy
Represents the hierarchy of the Java reference types known to KeY.
TypeOf
 
TypeOperator
Type operator.
TypeRef
 
TypeReference
TypeReferences reference Types by name.
TypeReferenceContainer
Type reference container.
TypeReferenceImp
TypeReferences reference Types by name.
TypeReferenceInfix
ReferencePrefix and -suffix that is admissible for outer type references.
TypeResolver
Several variable conditions deal with types.

TypeResolver.ElementTypeResolverForSV
 
TypeResolver.GenericSortResolver
 
TypeResolver.NonGenericSortResolver
 
TypeScope
The property of a non terminal program element to define a scope for types.

UnbalancedBlocksException
 
UnbindVariablesInstruction
 
UndeclaredProgramVariableCollector
This class is a specialization of ProgramVariableCollector which returns as result (UndeclaredProgramVariableCollector.result()) used LocationVariable which are undeclared, but used in the given ProgramElement.
UndoHistoryButton
A button consisting of an action component (normal button) and a selection menu (dropdown button).
UnhideCommand
Proof script command to insert a formula hidden earlier in the proof.
UnhideCommand.Parameters
 
UnicodeHelper
Contains commonly (at least in the context of KeY) used Unicode symbols.
UnicodeToggleAction
 
UninstantiatedGenericSortCollector
 
UninterpretedSymbolsHandler
This handler is a fallback handler that introduces a new uninterpreted function symbol with prefix "u_".
UninterpretedSymbolsHandler
This handler is a fallback handler that introduces a new uninterpreted function symbol with prefix in subscript
Union<A,B>
A union type contains a value that can be one of two types.
UnknownJavaTypeException
 
Unpack
 
UnparameterizedMergeContract
A MergeContract for UnparametricMergeProcedures like MergeByIfThenElse.
UnparametricMergeProcedure
A MergeProcedure like MergeByIfThenElse which can be applied without setting any parameters.
UnsignedShiftRight
Unsigned shift right.
UnsignedShiftRightAssignment
Unsigned shift right assignment.
UnwindLoop
This class is used to perform program transformations needed for the symbolic execution of a loop.
UpdateableOperator
 
UpdateApplication
Singleton class defining a binary operator {u}t that applies updates u to terms, formulas, or other updates t.
UpdateHandler
This handler treats KeY updated terms ({x:=5}x>4).
UpdateJunctor
Class of update junctor operators, i.e., operators connecting a given number of updates to create another update.
UpdateSimplificationMacro
This macro applies only update simplification rules.
UpdateSV
A schema variable that is used as placeholder for updates.
UrlRuleSource
 
UseDependencyContractApp<T>
 
UseDependencyContractRule
 
UseInformationFlowContractMacro
The macro UseInformationFlowContractMacro applies all applicable information flow contracts.
UseOperationContractRule
Implements the rule which inserts operation contracts for a method call.
UseOperationContractRule.AnonUpdateData
 
UseOperationContractRule.Instantiation
 
UseOperationContractRule.UseOperationContractRuleApplier
 
UserAction
Abstract concept of an action performed by the user.
UserActionListener
Listener for user actions.
UserDefinedSymbols
 
UserInterfaceControl
Provides the user interface independent logic to manage multiple proofs.
Util
 
Validator<T>
 
ValueInjector
 
Variable
A program model element representing variables.
VariableCondition
 
VariableConditionAdapter
The variable condition adapter can be used by variable conditions which can either fail or be successful, but which do not create a constraint.
VariableDeclaration
Variable declaration.
VariableNameProposer
Proposes names for variables (except program variables).
VariableNamer
Responsible for program variable naming issues.
VariableNamer.BasenameAndIndex
tuple of a basename and an index
VariableNamer.IndProgramElementName
ProgramElementName carrying an additional index
VariableReference
 
VariableReplacementMap
A replacement map for variables.
VariableScope
The property of a non terminal program element to define a scope for variables.
VariableSpecification
Variable specification that defines a variable name.
VariableSV
Schema variable that is instantiated with logical variables.
Verbosity
 
VersionChecker
Little helper class that helps to check for the version of a solver.
VersionStringComparator
Compares Strings by integer values of 'dot' separated components.
ViewSelector
Deprecated.
weigl, 2019-05-10: integrated into the StandardUISettings
ViewSettings
This class encapsulates information about: 1) relative font size in the prover view 2) the maximal number of lines a tooltip with instantiated SchemaVariables is allowed to have.
VisibilityModifier
Visibility modifier.
VisibleTermLabels
This abstract class is used by SequentViewLogicPrinter to determine the set of printed TermLabels.
Visitor
This class is implemented by visitors/walkers.
Visitor<T>
 
VMInstruction
Represents a single instruction in the matching virtual machine used by the KeY system.
VMProgramInterpreter
Interpreter for executing a sequence of instructions in a virtual machine designed for matching logical syntax elements.
VMTacletMatcher
Matching algorithm using a virtual machine based approach inspired by Voronkonv et al.
Volatile
Volatile.

WarySubstOp
 
Watchdog
Watchdog to monitor the state of the KeY system.

WDTacletGenerator
 
WdWhileInvariantRule

WeakValueLinkedHashMap<K,V>
A map implementation that associates keys with weakly referenced values, preserving the order of insertion.
WellDefinednessCheck
A contract for checking the well-definedness of a jml specification element (i.e.
WellDefinednessCheck.Condition
A static data structure for storing and passing two terms, denoting the implicit and the explicit part of a pre- or post-condition.
WellDefinednessCheck.POTerms
A data structure for storing and passing all specifications of a specification element including pre- and post-condition, a modifiable-clause and a list of all other clauses specified.
WellDefinednessCheck.TermAndFunc
A static data structure for passing a term with a function.
WellDefinednessMacro
This macro resolves the well-definedness transformer, i.e.
WellDefinednessPO
The proof obligation for well-definedness checks.
WellDefinednessPO.Variables
A static data structure for storing and passing the variables used in the actual proof.
WellDefinednessPOLoader
Loader for proof obligation arises from well definedness.
While
While.
WhileInvariantRule
 
WhileInvariantRule.AnonUpdateData
 
WhileInvariantRule.Instantiation
 
WhileInvariantRule.WhileInvariantRuleApplier
 
WhileInvariantRule.WhileInvariantRuleApplier.Guard
Represents a javaBlock which is executed if the trueTerm is true.
WhileInvariantTransformation
Walks through a java AST in depth-left-fist-order.
WhileInvariantTransformer
 
WhileLoopTransformation
Walks through a java AST in depth-left-fist-order.
WindowUserInterfaceControl
Implementation of UserInterfaceControl which controls the MainWindow with the typical user interface of KeY.
WrapLayout
FlowLayout subclass that fully supports wrapping of components.
WrapUtils
This class provides a simple routine that performs line wrapping of strings that may contain long lines.
Writable
Writeable objects have the possibility to be written to a StringBuilder.
XMLResources
An instance of this class loads several XML files, whose contents are displayed in InfoView.
XMLUtil
Provides static methods to work with XML.
XMLUtil.HTMLRendererReplacer
This XMLUtil.ITagReplacer can be used to render HTML into a plain text.
XMLUtil.ITagReplacer
Instances of this interface are used in XMLUtil.replaceTags(String, ITagReplacer) to replace an individual found tag.
Z3CESocket
 
Z3Socket
 
Zero
The Zero element of the sign lattice, representing only the number 0.
ZipFileCollection
Allows to iterate a zip file to return all matching entries as InputStreams.
ZipProofBundleHandler
A ProofBundleHandler for a proof bundle stored inside a zip file (usually the file extension will be "zproof").
